reviews.text: From my very first contact with Grand Rapids Disability Law Group, I was treated like a friend. I used them to get my Social Security Disability, and they were so knowledgeable and experienced and helpful. I did win in 2019. I later had need for other legal work, and I went right back to them. I'm so satisfied with them that I recently recommended them to a family member, who also chose to have them represent her.

The Disability Law Group, and Jacob Tighe specifically, not only helped me win my social security appeal, but also provided me with good information regarding the entire process and what vocational parameters Social Security Disability needs for approval. I'll always be grateful for the respect and dignity he gave me in all our interactions. My email inquiries were answered within a day or two, every time. Highly recommend!

Jacob was awesome in helping me get through the process of getting disability. Anytime I emailed him he answered promptly and it helped me a lot to have him with me during the hearing. I would definitely recommend him!

I had a great experience with this Law firm! They were very easy to work with and always responded promptly. I would highly recommend them to anyone who needs help getting disability benefits!
Angela Sanchez
Very professional and courteous. Kept me updated on what was happening and helped me through the entire process. I am grateful for Jacob's assistance and knowledge. Thank you!

I never thought I would ever say I was really happy with an attorney but Jason was extremely helpful , professional, and kind.  He was able to help me receive disability benefits with one application so it only took less than a year to start receiving my benefits . I could not be more grateful.  I highly recommend Jason Tighe!

I was nervous from the start, having a rare undiagnosed condition for years, BUT the team at Russell Law, and my lawyer, Jacob Tighe, in particular gave me such peace and confidence. Everything happened EXACTLY as I was told from start to finish, no surprises, not even in the billing. I trust this firm completely and would HIGHLY recommend them to anyone seeking permanent disability. Life can be painful, legal aid should be relief, and it is here.

Dan Widdis - medically retired
Very helpful and knowledgeable on the procedures and processes. Make the paperwork easier and great guidance during the time of waiting.
Excellent service.  Kept me updated on all activity concerning the case.  Reviewed what to expect during the hearing.

I was very satisfied with the service I received with the Disability Law Group, but especially with Jacob. If I ever had a question, and I had a lot, Jacob was very patient with me and always answered all my questions. If I called him at the office and he wasn't available, he always returned my calls that day. If I emailed him, he also responded that day. Jacob made my experience dealing with a disability claim so easy and smooth. I am truly grateful to Jacob and all the work he did for me.  Thanks Jacob.
Disability Law Group was a good choice.  Jacob was  helpful and effective.   He told us what to expect..  He made a touch situation a little easier.  Thank you.
Thank you, Russell Associates! Our sincerest thanks to, Jacob and his team, for all of the support on my case. Very respectful and considerate. Thanks again!
Jacob was very helpful.

I have made 3 attempts to contact them useing therr  application form and havent heard back in 3 weeks i guess id say its not a reputable company... or they dont know how to read or something because i gave them my email address and specified that its my only form of communication right now but all for nothing. I will be taking my business to some one who cares.
Great attorney! Aaron Israels is extremely knowledgable and through in understanding the needs of his clients. I highly recommend!!

Mr Schaefer is like family, dealing with my mother estate. He is very patience, and make sure you are well informed thur the entire process. I would definitely recommend him for your legal service. I am looking forward to working with him in the future.

One of my best friends set up an estate plan with Attorney Schaefer and as the administrator of that estate I can attest to the exceptional service my friend and I received. Attorney Schaefer and his staff provided much needed assistance as the administrator of the estate which made it very easy for me to execute my responsibilities. I would highly recommend Attorney Schaefer!
Bernard Schaefer is very professional and knowledgeable about legal issues. I will always thinks of his office for legal matters
He has helped myself and family in situations that needed his professionalism to solve.I would recommend Bernard in any situation that needs legal counseling.
Bernard Schaefer is courteous professional and friendly.
Bernard is fantastic! If I could give him 10 stars I would.  He stepped into a messy case and handled himself and the case like an experienced professional does. Highly recommended Bernard.

From the moment I became his client, Bernard was everything I needed in an attorney and more—experienced, knowledgeable, conscientious, strong in his advocacy, fair in his fees and even caring. I like to have a thorough understanding of anything I'm involved with—even something as arcane as the law and legal proceedings—and I found Bernard to be patient with my many questions and clear in his explanations. I highly recommend Mr. Schaefer.

Bernard Schaefer has represented me for civil and family court issues. He is caring, extremely experienced in court, trustworthy, anticipates barriers and moves you over the hurdles. Mr. Schaefer is fierce in court, professional, and put his foot down when many different entities tried to push me around. Mr. Schaefer is in control and not intimidated by anyone including other lawyers and even the judge. I have been in court with Bernard at least a dozen times... they say "you can't win them all"...but he has won them all for me! If I need a lawyer, Bernard is my 1st choice

We retained Mr. Schaefer for a rental real estate matter and could not have been more pleased. Mr. Schaefer is very prompt with either phone calls or email questions that came up. He is very professional and competent in his profession. We will definitely use Mr. Schaefer if legal issues arise again.
Bernard Schaefer is extremely supportive, and gave me great confidence in having my side heard in court. I would recommend Bernard’s legal counsel to anyone in need of representation.
Bernard was great to work with-the entire thing was a wonderful experience and he really listened to our concerns and understood what our end goals were.

Bernard provided incredibly good advice and support during an emotional legal issue.  Not only was I confident in his ability to resolve the issue, but appreciated his patience and kindness.  I would recommend Bernard to anyone needing legal counsel.

I have known Bernard Schaefer for 30 years and have respected his legal competence.  Only recently have I directly engaged his services.  He is competent, fully knowledgeable of the law, wise, fearless, and ultimately a problem solver.   The perfect combination I need in an attorney.

I retained the services of Mr Schaefer to handle the legal matters of a Estate, given I resided out of state, the issues would be conducted remotely. Mr. Schaefer is a competent professional who worked with me each step of the way. His fees are fair and reasonable. Should a occasion arise I would not hesitate to retain him again, and would recommend the same to others.

Bernard has been very diligent with the tasks  that I've given him from time to time. His willingness to offer sound advice is very much appreciated when I've needed answers on particular issues...I've referred a few of my family and friends to Mr Schaefer and will continue to do so.

Our Church was a victim of embezzlement by our pastor who refused to resign.  Mr. Schaefer helped to guide us through the process of terminating him and then successfully defended us when we were sued for wrongful discharge.  He helped to make sure the Church was paid in full for the restitution that was due and fought hard to represent our interests, successfully arguing our case before the Michigan Supreme Court.

We have Mr. Schaefer handle all of our real estate litigation. He provides excellent service and his reasonable fees make him a great value. He has a great deal of experience in real estate and is very knowledgeable on a wide range of topics.

My husband had an appeal case with unemployment so I signed up for an advocate. After researching the names on the list and with only a week before the hearing. I called Mr.Sutton out of his business hours expecting to just leave a voicemail and to my suprise he called me back within the hour..originally I kinda thought he was being rude but despite that I chose to go with him anyway..because he did know his law  and he had answers to everything I asked him. So the day before the hearing he called to remind us of the hearing and to go over everything one last time..he reassured me we had nothing to worry about and the day of the hearing..he did great and we won our case!! I definitely recommend Mr.Sutton for your unemployment appeal

Don't  waste your money. Mr. Sutton never even informed me of my hearing that was 5 miles from my home. Never contacted me that he was in the area or that the case was going to court. Never notified me that I had lost the case. Unemployment notified me. He put all my information in storage. Took my $750.00 and lost my case. I did take to the Attorney Grievance Commision who sided with him. Plan to appeal this if possible. Just bypass this grief and waste of money. There are free resources that are available if you look.

Very very good at what he does. Straight to the point does a great job. Caring, compassionate, and  professional. Will return back with any buisness I may have in the future. Strongly recommend. Thank you
Excellent!  Quick in responding.  Intelligent and warm.  Mr. Sutton did a great job for me.  When he told me not to worry.....I did not have to worry!

Mr. Dwaine Sutton did an absolutely amazing job at his work! He met with me where I was, traveled instead of having me travel. He listened and took notes, and then he was available to any call, text or email I had no matter the day. He prepared myself and himself for the phone court and he basically called out the ex employer on every single lie. He did an amazing job, and left the ex employer speechless! Point proven, case won!! Thank you Dwaine!

Dwaine won my case he was prepared cordial and kind. He listen to the facts and prepared the best case to win. I would highly recommend him in any UIA cases he is well educated and a fantastic lawyer. Thank you Dwaine best wishes to you.

Thank you for everything Dwaine! Dwaine took my case with two days notice. He was attentive and understanding, answering all of my calls and emails quickly. He did great at my hearing, I felt confident and supported!

Dwaine was a great help for me and I couldn't have done it without him! It was a scary experience to have a judge hearing, but he got me through it with flying colors! Thank you Dwaine! I would highly recommend you!

I have a really good feeling​ that these good reviews are fake or lies...

First day in court he brings a star wars book with him and sits in the back reading!!!
He was horrible with how he treated me in court,my ex was doing a great job at lying to the courts and had prove of her lies and when I tried to bring up points about her testimony that were untrue and I was told to (shut up I'm trying to her what she has to say),or a shhh,or he would just put his hand up and cut me off while I was trying to make those points.
Horrible attorney! Don't waste your money!

Awesome attorney who really wants to help you! He has very reasonable rates and doesn't just milk away your money like many Attorneys do. He is very caring and compassionate and I highly recommend him. He will always be the lawyer that I use.

He's a very caring nice guy who was very helpful
Melinda👍

Being represented by Haney Law Offices was the best decision we could have made for my wife's long-term disability. The team took over and gave us room to focus on healing and life. Haney Law Office's representation took the stress away from my wife and I during her continued health battles and resulted in a return to claim. Thank you!

I rarely take the time to write reviews, but the level of service that Troy Haney’s law office provides deserves a great review. When you need a lawyer it’s often because something very difficult in life is happening, and honestly, some lawyers can be scary to work with even when they are on your side. That is not the case with Troy Haney. He is very approachable, but also capable and kind. My husband and I always felt comfortable contacting him with any questions and were very confident in his ability as a lawyer. He makes sure to understand the difficulties you are dealing with and provides sound advice.  His assistant Kim is also amazing. She responds promptly and professionally to every phone call or email.  If you find yourself in need of a disability lawyer, Haney Law Office is the best.

My dad passed away march 20 four days before my birthday and than my mother suddenly passed away  on July 25 on my dads birthday from a heart attack and underlying heart diseases, she had life insurance and I was the beneficiary, she worked hard and they denied her and failed on so many levels , I hired Troy and he was exceptional and fought so hard for my mom and we finally are going to get it and now my momma and dad will both have a headstone I am forever grateful ! Although I wish I could have her back but at least he fought for her and won! Thank you ! I thank god to most of all !

Troy made me feel comfortable picking up the phone or sending  a text anytime I had a question without worrying about being nickeled and dimed. I will recommend him without reservation.

The contract, as it was, written by my employer had me forfeiting my ability to submit disability claims. Now, with the added legal language to the contract I'll be able to file a short term and long term disability claim.  Wow! thanks so much Troy - this is life changing for me.

Use this office 20 years ago.

I wish I could put into words how much Troy and his whole staff helped me through a very difficult time. Thank you so much for everything you have done. It truly has changed my life, and given me the peace of mind I haven't felt in years.
Troy and his staff are First Rate Professionals who work hard for you, and they care about you too.  I could not be more pleased for the representation they have provided for me at every turn.

Troy and Kim made the application process seamless. Trying to navigate all the steps without a professional is not worth the apparent cost savings. I would highly recommend Haney law for your application process.

When I was no longer able to work due to my deteriorating vision, I received invaluable advice from a respected colleague, a prominent medical malpractice defense attorney: “Hire an ERISA disability Insurance specialist, one who is well-versed in Michigan case law, insurance contracts, carriers and local  legal venues.”

Troy Haney embodies each of these traits.

I have been working with Troy since 2009, when he initially prepared and filed my disability insurance claim, which was approved immediately. He guided me  through various follow up communications and data requests from the insurance carrier, and continues to consult with me on various life events that could be potentially impacted by my disability insurance claim.

Troy possesses outstanding written and verbal communication skills, and has kept me well-informed throughout the claim process. His fee structure was clearly explained, and there were no surprises.

Troy guided me through a maze of uncertainty and complexity, and has earned my trust and gratitude

thank you Troy… you are the best!

I sought out Troy's help and from the first day I called Troy, Kim, and Al were exceptional, extremely helpful, listened to my concerns, and were able to talk things through clearly and efficiently. Troy is one of the few attorneys who works with long-term disability companies.Troy is so established and so good at what he does he was able to state a good case and provide all paperwork necessary for my long-term disability claim. I would not hesitate to recommend him to anybody who feels like they need someone on their side.

Mr. Haney is wise and gracious.   He took a great deal of time in our initial consultation to understand the complexity of our situation,  to frame our decisions based on his knowledge and experience,  and clearly put our interests before his own.  He has gained our trust.

Troy Haney was extremely helpful and skilled in giving me excellent professional advice as we worked on my private insurance policy disability claim.  What was nervous and nerve wracking for me, Troy broke it all down and put in in simple words and developed a very simple executable plan that brought the matter to ultimate success and finally closure.  Thank you Troy Haney!

After 6 years of being on LTD, my insurance company denied continuing.   I did first appeal myself with help from disability advocates.   First appeal was denied, as if they never read my appeal.  I realized I was up against Goliath   I was not David.  Troy Haney was my Davi . Threw 2nd appeal wad so very thorough and I . Didn't have to do anything.   My disability was reinstated.   I highly recommend Troy Haney, he is the best for this type of case

I didn’t know what to expect from hiring an attorney for my long term disability case, but Troy and his staff were able to explain the process in layman’s terms that answered my questions. Troy understood my concerns and followed through in bringing my case to a mutually agreeable resolution.

After becoming disabled with MS, on the recommendation a cousin who is a lawyer, I engaged Mr. Haney to guide me through the process of activating my private disability insurance. Despite numerous warnings from friends and family that the process would be extremely difficult, everything went perfectly smoothly, and Mr. Haney was a pleasure to work with. I would hearty recommend him to anyone who finds themselves in the position of needing legal representation with regards to disability.

I was diagnosed with a spinal cord injury and filed a short term disability with Sedgwick. Well they denied me forcing an appeal. I called Troy Haney and was the best decision i have made in awhile. Listen, dont go thru an appeal for STD or LTD without Troy. He knows Sedgwicks style and games. Let him battle these people so you can relax and wait for Troy to get the decision you want. They have putbulls, why not get your own. THANKS FOR EVERYTHING TROY AND KIM..!!!!

Awesome team!  Very pleased! Would recommend without hesitation

I was referred to Troy's office and was impressed from the onset with Kim who initially contacted me. In my experience, an attorney uses the initial phone consult to ascertain as quickly as possible if potential exists to get someone on retainer. The conversation is short and any meaningful advice is withheld until the meter is running.

That was not the case with Troy. He spoke with me at length on two different occasions. He really listened. And he genuinely cared. I actually tried to end the conversation the first call out of respect for his time. But, he continued because he wanted me to consider a few more things.

Both conversations ended with some advice for the next steps for me to take. And we decided moving forward to engage his services now was not in my best interest. I've never been so impressed with an attorney I actually didn't hire!

I'm sure his approach pays big dividends in the long run. He will be my first phone call in the future if needed. And I will recommend him to anyone I know needing help with ERISA, benefits, or disability issues.

Troy exceeded my expectations.  Even though things took a little longer than I thought, Troy coached me through the process and helped deliver an outcome that wouldn’t have been possible without him.  I would strongly recommend Troy for anyone who needs legal help with a disability issue!

reviews.text:
My experience with James Sherbin was deeply disappointing for both myself and my son. I hired Neumann Law to help challenge my ex-wife’s unilateral decision to put our son on ADHD medication under the assumption she had sole custody. I called Kelly Neumann with whom I attended high school with and she referred me to James Sherbin, who from the outset demonstrated a lack of experience, confidence, and courtroom presence.

Communication was poor, not clear and timid throughout. James was disorganized, extremely passive during proceedings, and failed to use critical evidence (including text messages) that could have supported my case.

On the day of the cross-examination, he called me just three hours before to ask whether I wanted him to attend in person or via Zoom—knowing full well he wouldn’t be able to make it to court on time from traverse city to Kalamazoo. He ended up appearing via Zoom, which was unprofessional and ill-prepared for such a crucial moment. Unacceptable.

Rather than working toward solutions or advocating effectively on my behalf, James seemed more concerned about his perineal feeling and whether I would escalate my concerns to his boss. To make matters worse, there were random, unexplained charges throughout the process.

Young, inexperienced and very passive.

James and Neumann law had no problem collecting over $11,200.00 yet terminated our agreement last night because he was offended that I contacted his boss. This is one of many examples of his mental weakness, inexperience and inability to be a leader and quality lawyer in the courtroom.

I would never recommend James Sherbin for legal representation in any capacity. My case required a capable, assertive lawyer—and unfortunately, I got the opposite.
Kelly and her team handle my case with professionalism and care. They were very responsive and I am very happy with the results of my case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your 5 star review!

reviews.text: John Scheuerle was very kind and knowledgeable!

reviews.text: The best choice I could’ve made was hiring Jason for my motorcycle accident. He and his team were not only knowledgeable but also compassionate about my situation.  He took his time making sure every detail of my accident was covered as there were several defendants.  He’s honest and sincere about what he’s doing and takes the time to explain why he’s doing what he’s doing, which meant a lot to me. He always kept me aware of where things were with my case and dotted all of the i’s and crossed all the t’s.  This allowed me to focus on healing while  navigated the legalities reducing stress. His attention to details resulted in me winning the case.  It’s definitely not something I could have navigated without him.  I wouldn’t hesitate to hire Jason again.  He’s top notch!
So thankful we didn’t have to deal with medical bills, they took care of everything and we could concentrate on healing!   Thank you and God bless you all!

Not only did they put up with me and all my calls and text for the civil aspects of my case, but they showed up to each criminal court proceeding as well to support me as the person who hit my husband was charged.

I hope no one has to go through what my family and I did, but the reality is it will happen to many others :( I strongly recommend that you reach other to jason...let his team take some of the struggle away.

Imo.. this should have been done years ago and I shouldn't have been charged. It should have been done 10 years ago. I did have a balance owed, divorce happened. Without hesitation I can recommend Glenn Smith.  He is responsive, professional and has a high degree of integrity.

Timothy J. Kilkenny

I was in pursuit of an attorney who could handle a very emotionally charged case for me. I interviewed three attorneys before I found Drew McInnis with CBH Attorneys & Counselors. With each of the other attorneys I interviewed at other firms, I was left unimpressed and unassured my case would be worked properly and could be won. Then I ran across Drew McInnis during an internet search - as his impressive credentials caught my attention. Because my case was quite complex, I needed someone who was super intelligent, had a true grasp on Michigan Law, had the confidence, passion, quickness, and savvy to go into the courtroom and had a keen understanding of what it takes to actually WIN cases in the courtroom. Within minutes of my first conversation with Drew McInnis, I knew he possessed ALL those things. I finally felt heard and had hope I could prevail against the Defendants. Drew was with me every step along the way. He helped me understand the progression of my case and always made the legalities clear and sensible to me, while also remaining compassionate and respectful about my fragile emotional state - which had brought me to filing the lawsuit in the first place. Drew worked diligently and tirelessly on my case, took both Defendants into the courtroom (much against their will), and BEAT both of their Attorneys. In this, he restored a huge amount of pride and peace in me - of which the Defendants had taken from me. He also won large monetary judgements from each of them - which others said would never happen. I will forever be grateful to Drew. Hiring him and his firm was one of the BEST things I've ever done. 5-Stars doesn't begin to cover how amazing an Attorney Drew McInnis is and how professional and efficient the entire staff at CBH Law Firm is. Needless to say, they have my HIGHEST RECOMMENDATION!

I highly recommend cbh. The Firm of Chase Bylenga Hulst is the BEST! Their knowledgeable guidance, patience and attitude gave me the confidence to get thru a stressful situation. I HIGHLY recommend their Firm for professional resolution's to legal matters.

The staff at Chase & Bylenga are very friendly and easy to work with.Great attorneys and very knowledgeable in numerous areas of law! Overall a great experience and environment! I would recommend Chase & Bylenga to family and friends.

Absolutely outstanding experience! If I could give 6 stars, I would. In situations like these, having the right team truly makes all the difference.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for your review, Tim. I’m truly grateful you took the time to share your experience. I’m also happy you were comfortable inviting me to the hospital after such a devastating crash.

I also appreciate your kind words about our team—they work hard to make sure our clients stay informed and supported throughout the process.

reviews.text: Working with Anne Mabbitt, was great!!  She is very knowledgeable, considerate, thorough and  honest. Anne worked very hard, was diligent and represented me well throughout the entire process. I highly recommend her and her entire team!!

reviews.text:
As good as it gets. Truly—look no further. Mabbitt Bhimani Law is as good as it gets.

I had a difficult case involving injuries from an auto crash. It felt like no one wanted to take it on because of the complexities. It wasn’t a sure thing, and it required legal counsel willing to work harder and accept more risk. The statute of limitations was literally days away, and I had almost given up hope. Finding Mabbitt Bhimani Law at the final hour felt like a gift.

From my very first conversation with Anne Mabbitt, I knew I had found the right representation. It was clear that she and her firm were all in—willing to accept the risk and fight my case through to the end.

Anne handled my case with exceptional care and grace. You can genuinely feel that she cares. I had many questions along the way, and Anne was always there—never rushed, always patient, and always kind. Her compassion truly shines through.

In the end, we reached a settlement that exceeded expectations. Anne and her team made me feel like I wasn’t just a case, but a person receiving the best care possible. They are incredibly confident, skilled, and successful at what they do.

They were a light that came from an otherwise dark experience, and I will never forget them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ken, thank you for sharing your thoughtful review. Your kind words made our day! We appreciate you taking the time to describe your experience--hearing this means a lot and helps other feel confident choosing to work with Mabbitt Bhimani Law. It was wonderful working with you, and we're grateful for the trust you placed in us throughout the process. Supporting clients through moments like this is one of the meaningful parts of what we do.

reviews.text: If I could give 100 stars I would!! If you want the best legal group this profession has to offer make the call here!!! I have never had a more caring, compassionate and superior group of professionals!!! They are unmatched in knowledge and expertise, I ensure they will provide you with the confidence and support every step of the way!! Absolutely the best of the best!!!

reviews.text: During what is an extremely stressful and disorienting moment post-injury, Anne Mabbitt helped me in every way a lawyer can and more. She explained clearly in simple language the next steps of the process. She showed genuine concern for my well-being and provided words of advice that were very helpful in my developing adult life. I was not the best at responding to her calls and emails, and their team was respectful with my time and miscommunication, being very patient with me throughout the under two years this case developed. And best of all, she was able to secure a very good settlement at no original cost to my finances. I couldn't be happier to have her as a lawyer who kept in phone and email contact over my chaotic master’s degree.
reviews.ownerResponse: What kind words, Mae. Personal injury cases can be very difficult—physically, emotionally, and financially. We know this accident took a toll on you. Thank you so much for sharing your experience and for trusting us during such a challenging time. Now go forth and do great things!

reviews.text: Mabbitt Bhimani Law was a lifesaver. They helped my dad, the accessibility remodel he needed. Dealing with insurance was a nightmare, but they made it easy. We're so grateful for their expertise and support.
reviews.ownerResponse: Megan, thank you for taking the time to leave this kind review. We are honored to have you and your dad as clients. We are very happy your dad now has the accessibility and support he needs.

reviews.text: Anne was our trial attorney for my teenage daughter’s auto accident case and from the time I met her I knew we had an amazing person fighting for us. She made us feel heard after a long period of being brushed off by our insurance company and also having to manage the aftermath of my daughter’s accident and injuries alone. Once she was on our team I was able to regain hope hospital bills would be paid and we would be appropriately compensated to help us move on with life in a positive way. Anne always listened to all my concerns and also any of my input regarding the trial. She worked with us not just for us and the outcome was extremely successful. I feel very grateful she was our attorney and would not hesitate for a minute to call on her again if need be in the future.
reviews.ownerResponse: Sarah, thank you for your review. Helping your family get out from under the storm of medical debt after such a terrible and frightening accident was our primary objective. No family should suffer with uncertainty caused by the insurance company’s refusals to pay benefits. We are so happy we were able to get all your medical bills and more paid at trial. Our best wishes to you and your family.

reviews.text: Gary and I met Anne after a life changing accident where a HUGE tree crushed the golf cart we were driving.  Anne came to the rehab facility where Gary was confined for a month being unable to walk.  After hearing all the facts, she agreed to represent us.  We felt a great sense of trust and honesty from her.  She kept us aware at all time and spent a great deal of time speaking to doctors and gathering medical records.  We are blessed to be alive and twice blessed to have a new friend.  Anne is a very special lady and a qualified attorney who believes in helping people.
reviews.ownerResponse: Patricia, we are so glad you and Gary found us after your accident. It has been a privilege to get to know you both and to help you through this incredible ordeal. We were able to show that the golf course failed to inspect and remove a tree that was actively decaying and threatening the safety of golfers. We are very sorry for everything you and Gary have been through, but watching you both fight for healing and to get your lives back has been truly inspiring.

reviews.text: Tyler Osburn subpoened me, so I called him to find out why. I left a message letting know what I wanted and asked him to call me back. He did not return my call which showed disrespect. Other words used to describe him by AI overview are unsettling, chauvinistic, dirty tactics, defamation, disregard for ethical boundaries, prioritizing his view over facts, and challenging the integrity of judges.

My wife and I had to  have some legal help with  our estate.  We were referred to Tyler by a friend.  Tyler did a great job helping us formulate our ideas, make the necessary changes, and get them implemented.  Tyler was professional, courteous, and a pleasure to work with.
Straight forward and they get results

Tyler Osburn is a disappointment of a "divorce lawyer" and should stick to business law. He overly complicates simple cases in order to make "big bucks" off low income families. His tactics are straight out of the 1980's playbook when it comes to using false accusations and fraudulently misleads the court. He wastes time (delays responses, files frivolous motions, "loses" documents and evidence), and racks up senseless legal fees. He harasses parties with baseless threats and fabricates accusations with no substantiation. Tyler epitomizes a greasy slimy disheveled lawyer straight out of the old TV shows. During which I explained the facts of what happened. He listened intently, explained the law to me in understandable non-attorney terms, and whether he intended to or not, he calmed me down. Looking back on that day, I can say it was arguably the most stressed day of my life, and Tyler took care of me.

To anyone on the fence about hiring him. Don't hesitate, he's your guy.

reviews.text: We hired Patrick for my work injury related claim that Workers Comp (WC) and STD denied to approve during while on FMLA. At my initial consultation with Patrick, he was honest and transparent about what the appeal process for my WC was going to look like and what to expect. He was kind, reassuring, and validated my experience in that my WC claim should have never been denied by them because my incident was clearly caused as a result of my job. Patrick explained all the confusing information in a way that i was able to understand it clearly. He remained in communication with me through email and phone, during the whole process, even when nothing was happening and was just a waiting game. After a few long months, Patrick informed me that WC wanted to settle!!! He and his office took care of everything! All I had to do was share with him my situation and sign documents. Patrick's attorney fees were very resonable and consistent with other business, injury, and work claim attorneys. Once WC sent their payment to him, Patrick immediately mailed my settlement check to me.....Hands down, I cant say enough good things about him and his office staff!!! Thank you again Patrick. You rock!!!! 😉👍

reviews.text: Mark is great to work with!! I received an interlock on my first hearing, and on my appeal after 1 year I was able to get it removed.

Mark Caldwell is an outstanding attorney, especially when the odds are stacked against you.
After three years, I had to pursue an appeal in a system where most people never get their license back once a magistrate is involved. The process is complex, highly scrutinized, and leaves very little room for error. From the start, Mark understood exactly what was at stake and how high the bar truly was.
He was meticulous, strategic, and incredibly knowledgeable. Mark prepared my appeal with precision, explained every step clearly, and never minimized how challenging the process would be — while still giving me confidence that my case was being handled the right way. His professionalism and preparation made all the difference.
Because of Mark’s advocacy, I was able to successfully navigate an appeal that very few people ever win. If you need an attorney who understands the law, the system, and how to fight effectively when the outcome is far from guaranteed, I highly recommend Mark Caldwell.
— Wendy

It’s unfortunate to see the negative reviews here.  Not one of them claims they were innocent — the complaints are really about money. The truth is, cheap lawyers are rarely good, and good lawyers are not cheap. Someone admitted being only one point above the legal limit… that’s still guilty, and a danger to everyone else on the road. It’s not fair to blame others — including their lawyers — for their own mistakes. What they don’t understand is that there is always more to the story.

My own experience with Jason Barrix has been completely different. He was professional, strategic, and got the best possible outcome for the family members and friends he has represented. I will continue to refer everyone I know to Jason because I trust him to deliver results.

reviews.text:
Jason Barrix was the worst person. I could have hired, to represent me in my driving while impaired charge. There are many reasons why Mr.Barrix was a huge mistake.

I should have known when he didn't show up for my arraignment.  Which is not even bad, considering what happened.  When I went to my pre-trial conference where my attorney spoke to the prosecutor to see what they could come up with for me, was the first downfall of my case.  I had breathalyzed at .o8, which is .01 past the legal limit. The police also found, in my car,  2 medications that I had been prescribed which were an opiate pain killer and a scheduled drug for anxiety.  I had prescriptions for both.  So when the prosector wanted to charge me with 2 cts. of felony drug possession, I went to the State of Michigan database and got a printout of my account proving i had prescriptions.  But Mr Barix did not show it to the prosecutor.  Instead, he advised me to plead those 2 charges out.  At the time I was uninformed and I didn't have a clue about anything in my case. He told me he couldn't use that database info bc it was a violation of my HIPAA rights. What?  I'm permitting him to view these records. Instead, he has me plead guilty to something I didn't do.  Good legal advice. Then came the really bad part. My ex-husband hired Mr. Barix to assist him in a legal matter. My ex didn't pay mr Barrix's bill on time and Mr. Barrix came to me about it. I didn't have any money to pay the $200 balance. So, Mr Barrix said he could no longer represent me because it was a 'conflict of interest" for him.  So he kept my $4 THOUSAND retainer that I had paid him and I never saw him again.  HE DIDN'T SHOW FOR THE ARRAIGNMENT AND HE DID SHOW FOR THE PRETRIAL HEARING BUT GAVE ME HORRIBLE ADVICE WHEN IT COULD HAVE EASILY GONE AWAY.  THAT EQUALS $4 THOUSAND???. THAT IS ALL HE DID.  I HAD TO GO HIRE ANOTHER ATTORNEY AND GIVE THAT ATTORNEY A HEFTY RETAINER.

I will never forget M. Barrix or his awful legal representation.  I would think twice about hiring him. Obviously,  he has had successful cases and represented people who gave him high ratings. So, he only selectively scams people.... Maybe it's every 45th client that he does dirty like he did me.  I would hate to be that 45th client.  And if you are, kiss your legal issues hello because it will likely become worse for you, like it did for me.  I wish I had never hired him, which was 10 years ago.  It was one of my worst mistakes. At least, I get satisfaction knowing he is the victim of his own damn bad karma.  Bc you don't screw over people who are struggling,  like that, and get away with it.

reviews.text:
I was notified of a hearing for a situation that seemed implausible.  No attorney was willing to work with me and the ones that were, made it quite apparent that I would lose.  The amount of negativity that I received while calling around to find representation was gut wrenching to me.  Losing this case meant losing my house, my license, my vehicle, my career, and possibly my children.  Simply DEVASTATING.

Following are a few sentences I heard from other attorneys:

'You should just admit to it. You'd be better off.'
'If you have the ability to move out of the state, I would recommend it.'
'You will likely lose but I will represent you.'

The list goes on and I had many attorneys who would not return my calls to even discuss the case with me.  The emotions this stirred up were exhausting.  I even considered stating I was guilty, when I was not, because I was so discouraged.

Jason Barrix was confident when talking to me from the very beginning.  He actively listened to what I was saying and responded to me on a very personable level.  He made me feel like an adult who made a simple error, not like a child who needed to accept that I had no other option but to face the consequences for something I did not do.  And with that feeling, I knew no matter the end result, I wanted him by my side.

Once all of the information was gathered, Jason proceeded with an attack that was not only specific to my situation, he went about the entire case as if it were my own in comparison to itself, and not in comparison to others who had been where I was.

I hired Jason last minute and he invested a mass amount of effort and time into piecing every small detail together within days.  He came up with information and evidence that I would have never thought to gather.  Information that other law firms did not think to present or even consider as options.

Going into my hearing, I was still recalling all of the negative voices in my head and prepared for the worst outcome, but Jason quickly turned that around once the hearing started, with how confident he was in representing me.

By the end of my hearing, I was in tears.  But not the tears I was mentally prepared for.  They were tears of joy and the weight of the world being taken off of my shoulders.

With Jason's representation, I not only walked away from the hearing with my life still fully intact, I walked away with a simple lecture and a note on my records.  That was IT.  A month of extreme worry pending my hearing was finally at rest, with the BEST possible outcome.  My implausible case was proven to be extremely plausible, with Barrix Law Firm's competency and expertise.

I am beyond grateful for Jason.  I can not express my sincere gratitude enough for this man and his extensive efforts.  I HIGHLY recommend Barrix Law Firm and will never use another Law Firm.

Thank you so much, Barrix Law Firm for the pristine representation!  YOU HONESTLY SAVED MY LIFE.

reviews.text:
I contracted with Jason for a quite complex, and “petty” small misdemeanor charge (involving a shared food app), while going through a child custody/paternity/support battle with (plaintiff in this case).

Jason helped me navigate the stresses, helped keep me focused on my priorities while going through this, and delivered amazing motions with law, facts and evidence, to prove I was not guilty of the alleged charge, and proper resolution in the end, that got our case dismissed with no trial, no conviction, and no court fines.

I was beyond impressed with how Jason wrote in his words for the courts,  and his decades of experience in representing so many cases, including one such as this.
I appreciate his straight forwardness, and honesty that is respectable.

I hope to never need his services again (humor here) - but if in some weird turn of life events - I’d call Jason to represent me!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the review.   Some cases that appear smaller can be the most complex and require a lot of work.  I am happy we could help you.   As you know my practice is limited to criminal defense and injury cases.  We don't handle other areas such as family law but make referrals to other lawyers who may practice in those areas.  Glad things went well for you.  Thanks again for the review .

reviews.text: Mika Meyers is one of the most respected and successful law firms in the city of Grand Rapids.  If you are in need of representation, I would suggest calling Dominic Clolinger and having a conversation.

We were entirely impressed by Dan’s attention to detail and thoroughness in reviewing stacks and stacks of documents during discovery.  When opposing counsel pulled a multi-page spreadsheet during arbitration, Dan was able, in real time, to show, line-by-line, that the defense’s arguments were incorrect and didn’t match the facts.  After the arbitration hearing, they offered to settle and we were awarded approximately the maximum we could have expected. Very impressive, and a very nice, personable person to work with.

Dan is a wonderful attorney! He always makes the time to communicate Very effectively And in a timely manner.  He is extremely Patient which is so helpful in Stressful situations that arise.  You’re in great hands with Dan as your attorney.
Great job in all aspects of my case. Very approachable, responsive, and professional.
We have worked with Dan Broxup and he is AMAZING. Very knowledgeable. Highly recommend him. Everyone that we came in contact with in the office or over the phone were  helpful as well.

My husband and I needed someone to help us with a legal matter and were given Daniel Broxup's name at Mika Meyers PLC. He was quick to respond to any questions we had and helped us so much with our legal matter.  I would highly suggest using Daniel Broxup.

I’ve been a loyal client of Mika Meyers for quite some time now, and I’ve always been happy with their services. They’ve handled everything from litigations and contracts to IP, and I’ve never been disappointed.

It’s never a great time in life when you have to hire an attorney but Dan did an amazing job. He was on top of any discovery filed and was excellent with his communication. Which communication these days is hard to come, but Dan was on point. Highly recommend this firm.

I was extremely satisfied with the representation I received from Dan and his team at Mika Meyers PLC. They kept me abreast of everything along the way and helped us get to a reasonable solution. I recommend them without hesitation.
Tanks to DAN , we achieved a favorable resolution and I would highly recommend to anyone needing skilled representation in the securities industry . Thank you DAN and his firm Mika Meyers PLC
Attorneys tend to not get back to you .
Not worth it. They didn’t do anything extra for me and I would’ve been better off doing it myself.

Kim Large is top notch! The best divorce attorney without a doubt! She fights hard for her clients, shows up strong and takes great care of those she is working for! Hands down I trust her with legal needs!

Kim and her team at Mika Meyers are always such a pleasure to work with! They are responsive, and informative and we will continue to use them for anything our company may need. Thank you Kim and team for everything!
Kim Large is an amazing and very personable attorney. She takes time to listen to your issues, and tailors her legal advice to your situation.

I've worked with several attorneys at Mika Meyers over the last 4 years, and wouldn't hesitate to work with them again.

Kim Large has helped me achieve a successful conclusion to a false advertising dispute with Menards. The dispute was over a semi truck of OSB I purchased on sale for my business just before Covid-19 caused OSB prices to skyrocket. After they accepted my online order and money changed hands, Menards wanted to refund me and limit my purchase to 90 sheets, Kim resolved the dispute with a letter and a phone call.

Kim Large has alway been my point of contact but in matters outside of her expertise she has referred me to other attorneys at Mika Meyers.

Mike Huff and Douglas Donnel were great to work with when it came time to purchase my commercial building from my land lord. The first right of refusal I was granted in my lease was not honored and it turned into a 3-way suit between My Landlord, his 'purchaser', and me. Mike and Doug stopped the sale, and was able to work out a very favorable end result for me.

Now that it is time to trademark a few things for my business I have reached out to Kim again and it turns out they even have some that specializes in trademarks! She has put me in touch with Jennifer Puplava at her firm and I am excited for what will come of that!

Highly recommend Kim and the attorneys at Mika Meyers
Kim Large is very knowledgeable and easy to work with
I've had a great experience with this law firm and two of their attorneys for different facets of my business. Highly recommend.
I used Mika Meyers to create some business related documents.  I was very happy with their service.
Reach out to Kim Large, fabulous work!! Thank you Kim

Absolutely no legal representation. Recently completed a divorce using Mika Meyers. If you want someone to fight for you pick someone else. Paid over 20k to not have anyone fight for what is actually fair. Definitely would not recommend!

I wanted to share feedback with my attorney instead of posting a review, but she didn’t respond to my email about wanting to do so.

I was referred to Amber Soler via her colleague, Neil Jansen. My family had been dealing with him since last year, he was a great communicator and was able to answer questions for me prior to making the decision to hire an attorney for my case.

I was communicating with Amber via email. She was responsive in the beginning, when I was looking to set up a consultation with her. The day of our first consultation, she cancelled as I was driving there because she was sick. We were able to reschedule for that following week. She seemed confident in her strategy to win my case.

When it came time to pay my retainer, it seemed to go downhill. She barely acknowledged or responded to emails or texts (she welcomed me to reach out on her cell). We had a meeting scheduled to further talk strategy, I confirmed that she didn’t have court so she would be available that whole day but she didn’t follow through and we didn’t meet. After that, I spoke with her on the phone once regarding evidence I shared but she didn’t expand on her strategy. When it came time for the hearing, she didn’t call a key witness despite my communication that the witness was important. Her witness questions lacked critical thinking as to the information that was important to extract. Most of all, her closing argument showed that she hadn’t spent enough time with the evidence that I’d given her, she was recalling incorrect details and grasping for straws.

Based on my experience, I would not recommend her to anyone else.
plenty of fish in the sea; this isn't worth your time, bait, catch or even leaving port. Throw back if on the line.
Makes you wonder if professionalism is out of style.

He only cared about making money off of me. He didn't care about me and my situation. He didnt even take care of everything like he said. But he charged me for it. I'm sure there are good lawyers out there somewhere. Not this one. It's a shame. Not sure how you sleep at night Richard Wilson!

Would give 0 stars if possible.

Ross Leisman is what’s wrong with humanity.    He is the most unprofessional person I’ve met.  I called to ask clarifying questions and he couldn’t answer them. Instead he got frustrated and accused me of arguing. I guess that’s what people do now a days they get defensive and accuse the person of arguing. He is very frustrating and won’t respond to emails or return a phone call. He is the worst stay far way from him and if this firm.  He has zero integrity and lacks common sense. Don’t be fooled by the reviews.

Weird I can’t respond to your comment.  Did I say anywhere that I was a client? That would be no, nor would I ever Be based on Ross’s actions and the reviews.  It was implied I wasn't when I made the statement of asking clarifying questions and he got defensive and argued with me. I was trying to resolve the issue by contacting Ross and the city which the unprofessionalism was clear.  What I said was the truth and based on the other reviews looks that I am very accurate.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Karachy, our records indicate that you are not, and never have been, a client of this firm.  In fact, our records reflect you are adverse to one of our clients for whom we achieved a favorable result.

reviews.text: The attorneys in this group have been very helpful every time I have needed legal advice.

Bills were sent without any prior explanation of fee structure. Tasks were agreed to be be completed by the firm 3 months ago, but never confirmed as being completed. Requests for status have not been responded to. Requested action 6 weeks ago - got billed - but no communication that any action has been taken per request. Firm is non-responsive to requests for status to my requests as a client. Do NOT recommend. Stay away from this firm. Awful.
Employees have zero integrity and lack any common sense

He only cared about making money off of me. He didn't care about me and my situation. He didnt even take care of everything like he said. But he charged me for it. I'm sure there are good lawyers out there somewhere. Not this one. It's a shame. Not sure how you sleep at night.
friends don't let friends use these people

They have been quite helpful and informative

We came to Nate Wolf in crisis mode.

Nate is not even midway through our project and I feel like we've already won.

When your family is counting on you to beat a company that conducts their day to day with the evil that rivals a James Bond villain, you hire Nate!

Thank you, Nate!!!
This firm took away a years worth of stress in 15 minutes best choice I ever made with this fight  in probate.
Wonderful people!!
Just an all-round mistake to hire this firm; good luck Dads.

Mr. Kimball started a domino effect executing a simple will, he did not read through it before giving it to me. There was a new will attached to the back of the old. Ending result, wrong executor. When I called with questions, I had to deal with an assistant who was there only weeks, who provided me with wrong information. This caused a beehive of activity within the family.  Ended up firing this firm and hired another. Again, a simple will with no assets. Just a bank account balance.
I highly recommend Kim Large at Mika Meyers! She is extremely knowledge and will fight for you! She is really easy to talk to and professional.

I have known Neal for almost 2 years, his knowledge on estate planning is second to none.  I am so impressed with his knowledge and what I have learned  from him.  I would highly recommend Neal and Mika Meyers to anyone needing assistance with estate planning.
This is my place of employment 41 years and counting!
While I was pretty satisfied with the mediation here, it did not come easily. I felt like I was treated differently because I was a man and the primary money earner.

We have used Daniel Broxup for all our companies (West Michigan Band Instruments) legal needs. Daniel has been very professional and has always been responsive to our needs and requests, even if they are after hours! I would highly recommend Daniel and Mika Meyers for all your legal needs.

Daniel Broxup was a lifesaver for my family.  Brokers have no problems finding attorneys, but the general public has no one.  Mr. Broxup and his team were wonderful helping me in the FINRA case.  They analyzed all the relevant information and the resulting settlement was great.  He understood the issues that needed to be addressed, and was able to explain it to all involved.  He proves the system can work for all.   He is a great credit to the profession.

We were referred to Amy G! We didn't get far enough in the conversation. Call them and listen to the automated system, it's absolutely horrible. When the Receptionist got on the line, I could barely hear him. When I expressed that, he acknowledged it and continued. It is a horrible phone system, an easy fix but hey.....we will find someone! Sorry to Amy!

worked with this law firm in 2021, they confidently said they could help me with my situation. They assured me it was “easy” for them to help me in the ways i needed. Charged me $2,000 and they did absolutely NOTHING. I could hardly ever even get a call back. I had to constantly contact them to ever hear ANY update on my case. And they truly never had an update, i was always left with “no update due to covid reasons”. That’s what my case was left on… $2,000 for absolutely nothing. Absolutely awful service and just give you false hope to pry money out of you.

They treated me incredibly. They were always there, answering my calls and messages. They won my asylum case. They were very responsible and always kept me informed about everything that was happening with the case and gave me advice on everything I should, could, and couldn't do. This law firm is amazing and I highly recommend it.
Maria was very kind and friendly during the call.

If I could leave 0 stars I would. I hired Amy to represent me for my divorce and had to fire her, as she’s been nothing but useless. We are 8 months into my divorce with no children and minimal assets, thousands of dollars into paying her, and I’ve only spoken to her directly a couple of times. When I call she’s never available to talk. She let my ex spend months waiting to fill out discovery forms, and told me if I wanted to file a motion to compel him, then I’d need to pay my full balance despite having a payment plan and out another 1K down. We are no closer to being divorced and I’ve spent over 5K at this point. I fired her and found a new attorney which has costed me more due to the money I wasted on her.
I thank attorney Meghan and her team for helping me obtain my citizenship despite having two DUIs on my record. Thank you.

Robert responded to me on social media. When I DM him, he was able to give me several minutes of his time. I was very grateful. No one else wanted to give me guidance and have me contact them like Robert did. I am grateful. Seems like a very nice and intelligent attorney. I would recommend him to everyone. Thank you Robert.
I had a great experience working with Robert and his team who listened and fought on my behalf. Highly recommended by far!

To start, I don’t give 5 star reviews.  GREAT attorneys get 4 stars because they are responsive, service minded, and genuinely care, like Robert Alvarez.  I always appreciate his guidance, and recommend ALG!

Please make avanti your last choice.

Diligent team of attorneys that treat you like family. They work with you and respect you, their expertise and interpretation of the law is outstanding.

Meghan and her team have been phenomenal with helping my husband and I with processing our marriage-based visa. Everything was explained thoroughly and every question was always answered in a timely manner. Definitely recommend for future services!
Very grateful. Excellent team.

Do Not Hire this attorney. Read carefully the negative reviews. He will take your money and if the judge is his buddy will do whatever the judge tells him to do on your case even if it means "throwing" your case just like others have commented. He told me what he would do in court and then did not do it. Then he met with the judge in chambers and refused to present my case. He refused to continue representing me and then demanded more money.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to provide feedback. We take this seriously and would like to connect via a phone conversation. Please call us at (616) 458-3994 at your earliest convenience.

reviews.text: I hired miles Murphy to take 2 cases paid $4000 upfront. Miles explained how valuable of an attorney he is I accepted him as my attorney worst mistake I made. My first case we had an issue when he spoke with judge he came back said I did not tell him I had a small incident when I was 18 which I did tell him all of my records and that was 15 years ago has nothing to do with this case. So that case was lost because he did not properly respond to judge. When miles Murphy and I spoke to judge for sentencing the judge looked at me and said I will not take your plea as guilty miles Murphy said to plea guilty as if he did not want prove my innocence. So this case was a fail for miles Murphy and I did not know how to afford another lawyer so I had to keep him. Second case was a custody battle and we discussed that I just want it to be a fair case for me and we agreed on some custody rights and foc is supposed to be his stronger skill. So case was in front of judge and because my plea from first case judge did not give me a chance to speak and did not give me any rights. I hired my miles Murphy to defend me and both cases was not even close to what he said he could do basically miles Murphy took my money and when both cases was done said you can hire a different attorney and I said I paid you not another attorney then he said I’m not gonna be your attorney no more. I got taken for $4000 and it was a nightmare stay away from miles Murphy he will tell you what you want to hear but my experience was he was the worst lawyer I could have I lost everything. I’m hiring a new lawyer and this person is truly confident they can win for a cheaper price.

Miles represents my ex wife he demanded more appraisals on mutiple property we owed neting  me 50 k more than I was asking for in the settlement I would give mile 100 stars review if I could.
Thank you miles

Miles and his team are simply the best! They communicate and handle a difficult situation with exceptional professionalism. Peace of mind is everything and they provide that and more. Would highly recommend for all legal matters. Thanks to the whole team, especially Bri! Lifesavers in the truest sense of the word!

Jerry and Emily went above and beyond to settle my dog bite case while maximizing my settlement, putting my needs as a client first, and staying professional yet empathetic. I felt assured and well-informed throughout the entire process and would recommend them to anyone in need of representation.
Jerry is an amazing attorney he made the process very easy. I did what he said and received a full  restoration the first time.

I do not recommend Jerry! He was more of a prosecutor in my case than a defender. All I can say is you get what you pay for. If your looking for an attorney that will work with and fight for you, I highly suggest you look elsewhere!!!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Kristi,
We appreciate your review and thought about your experience with our law firm. We understand your frustrations regarding your case, but we can assure you we did not act as a prosecutor in your case. Given the circumstances regarding your case, simply put is what you received in terms of a sentence from the Court was very typical and not harder or more severe than others similarly situated. This just happens to be a tough Court and you are not alone regarding how you feel about the situation. We wish you the best of luck in the future!

reviews.text: Beurkens law was very helpful every step of the way in getting my license back. Emily returned all emails in a timely manner, and was always there to answer any questions that I had during this process.

reviews.text: I would absolutely 100% recommend  Jerry M. Beurkens, P.C & Company to anyone looking for an attorney to represent them in court!
