reviews.text: Very experienced and knowledgeable in both personally injury and criminal law. I have utilized Jerry Beurkens on more than one occasion and the outcome has always been better than expected because he was in my corner. I'd highly recommend working with both Jerry and Kara Beurkens.

I would highly recommend Jerry to help with your attorney needs. He has represented me and that entails a lot, he is very in tune to my needs as I suffer with severe anxiety.  His kindness, reassurance and patience while going above and beyond has made my situation a little easier. He’s easy to contact and willing to walk you through the process, answer your questions,
as many as you have and truly there with you every step of the way. I am sincerely thankful for him.

I had the pleasure of having both Jerry and Kara work on my case. They did a fantastic job handling my license restoration case for an extremely fair price. I currently live out of state and they got me approved for a full license up against the toughest hearing officer. So glad I decided to hire them and highly recommend them to anyone going through this difficult time.

I hired Beurkens Law Firm so they could help me with Secretary of State on getting my Drivers License back. Attorney Kara Beurkens assisted me and was very thorough. I received a restricted license and will definitely hire her for my next hearing.
Update: 2020 - I followed everything I needed to do and had my 2nd hearing and Attorney Kara assisted me again and I received my Drivers License. Thank you Attorney Kara, you are the best! You won't be disappointed hiring Beurkens Law Firm!

I am very grateful for the help I received from Attorney Jerry Beurkens. Right away he responded back to me letting me know what to do and that he would take care of everything. He was very nice to work with and his knowledge and experience put my mind at ease. He followed through exactly as he said he would do and kept me informed throughout the process until everything was taken care of and finished. I was very happy with the outcome and grateful to find a trustworthy and supportive attorney to represent me. I definitely recommend him.

I was working with Kara to get my license back after 9 long years. I had some cognitive hiccups due to memory loss and a real lack of trust when it came to this issue. Kara was genuinely compassionate and resolved the issue with such grace. I couldnt have asked for a more caring and supportive lawyer to represent me. 10/10
Terrible lawyer.  Canceled my hearing twice, then showed up to the third scheduled hearing un-prepared.  Lol.  He still thought MDOC gave good time.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hello J Fountain, we do not have any record of representing you. Please contact Kara directly at 616-459-5344 so that we can address your concerns. It appears you have the wrong law firm.

reviews.text: Kara Beurkens handled my drivers license restoration case. I had my license taken away in Michigan over 11 years ago for multiple drunk driving’s when I was young and dumb. I have lived out of state however since end of 2012 so I had no idea how to go about getting the hold off my license and I couldn’t have done it without her and her amazing team! As a mother of 4 who changed her life around and needed this so bad I couldn’t express how truly grateful I am!!! God is so good ❤️ Thank you so much again! I highly recommend Beurkens Law! Especially if you truly have turned your life around and need this one last thing to move forward with your life in a positive direction.
Kara did a great job preparing me for my license restoration hearing. The process was smooth and the hearing went very well.

Kara was great! Thanks to her I was able to get my license back after getting denied the first time. She and her staff are very knowledgeable, professional and quick to respond. I definitely recommend working with her and will in the future, if needed!

Very professional and knowledge firm. With Jerry's help I was able to take care of all my legal issues with the best possible outcome.  I would definitely recommend him and his firm to anyone looking for help in sorting out any problem they might have.

Hi, obviously my name is Mike.  I am with a good friend of mine Marilyn Carmer and since she is still using a land line ( not really but almost ) She asked me to convey her thoughts and experience with Berukens Law firm.  She ( is standing over my shoulder dictating to me at the moment what to write ) is very pleased and felt respected and treated with dignity with her experience.  The personal touch from Jerry and Kara , the follow up with phone calls ,keeping her apprised of the current status regarding her legal delima was beyond impressive.  The tactics, actions and strategies incorporated on her behalf where exceptional, and well above par.  Marilyn highly recommends Burekens law  for any legal matter to anyone.

My attorney really took time to get to know me so she could best represent me and my case. There were never any surprises and we were successful at every turn in winning the case. Easy to work with, well spoken and very organized I would recommend Beurkens law for anyone needing representation.

My experience with Beurkens Law was outstanding.  They went above what my expectations initially were.  Since this was my first experience with a legal suit, I had no idea what steps I should take.  They walked me through the somewhat lengthy process until it was settled to my satisfaction.  Thank you Jerry and Kara!

Beurkens Law successfully represented me on a Secretary of State issue. I live out of state and they were able to coordinate everything and make accommodations to allow us to have a positive outcome without requiring me to travel back to MI.
Very helpful people they help me out every step of the way I would recommend them to everyone

Highly Recommended!!!
I am glad I had Buerkens Law represent me in my case, they were very informative, transparent and responsive. Jerry, Kara  and Carol are awesome.

Kara & Jerry were fantastic in helping me restore my driving privileges to restricted after two DUI's.  I started working with Jerry about 2 years ago but hit pause on the process out of fear.  After an extremely long delay on my side I finally hit resume but assumed I lost my original payment.

This time Kara took over my case and was extremely patient and helpful through the whole ordeal.  Best of all, I didn't have to "re-hire" them, Kara made sure I knew my original payment was still good and picked up where we left off.

Hands down will hire them again in 12 months when I need to go through the SOS hearing again to restore my full license.
Fantastic representation, follow up, and preparation.  Highly recommend the Beurkens Team!!  Thanks again!

A few years ago,  I was in need of seeking legal representation for various legal matters. I went to Jerry Beurkens for help during this difficult time in my life.  Jerry's ethics are of the highest standards.  During this time, we formed a friendship,  I gained his trust, while I was impressed by his knowledge of the law and admired his reputation and integrity of the court system.  Jerry has a calming presence and a polite and respectful attitude inside the courtroom and outside of it. Jerry helped me personally to be positive and stay focused on the larger picture.
I would highly recommend Jerry Beurkens to anyone seeking legal representation.
The attorneys at Beurkens Law handled my drunk driving case in Grand Rapids and got the charges reduced. Their fees were very reasonable.  I highly recommend them!
Beurkens law handled my automobile accident case in Grand Rapids.The attorneys obtained a favorable settlement on my behalf. I highly recommend Beurkens law.
The attorneys at Beirken’s Law handled my mother’s pedestrian personal injury case and obtained a favorable settlement for her. I highly recommend using Beurken’s Law!

Beurkens Law handled my motorcycle personal injury claim in Holland, Michigan. All of my medical bills were paid in a prompt fashion. Jerry was able to obtain a settlement for my injuries and I highly recommend Beurkens Law.

Jerry handled a motor vehicle accident for me. He kept me informed throughout the whole process and was always available to answer any question I had.  No payment was required until a settlement was reached and he continued to work with me to get medical bills paid even after a settlement was reached.
I highly recommend Jerry Beurkens as your personal attorney. He has helped us on several occasions. He was prompt, professional and prepared.

Have used mr. Beurkens a couple of times over the last few years. Once in an embezzlement case that he helped get a great settlement and for a couple other small issues. I have also used him to recommend another attorney that he thought would be better for certain things. Most recently in a real estate matter and that recommendation was excellent as well. I thought his fees were in line for the excellent quality of work preformed. Would highly recommend.
Good lawyer, he did a good job for my son.
Kara Beurkens is a amazing lawyer helped me and my father with our cases. Definitely will hire her again she was very caring, recommend to everybody

I recieved the absolute best legal service through the Beurkens law firm. After consulting with them the very first time, I immediately felt at ease and knew I was in the right hands. I couldnt be happier with the outcome. They saved me so much time, money, and stress.  THANK YOU!!
I would highly recommend Beurkens Law for any of your legal needs.  They are honest and trustworthy and will always fight with your best interest in mind.

Our family has worked with Beurkens Law for over 15 years and have never been disappointed.  Not only did they provide excellent service and advise , they helped us remain calm when dealing with our legal matters and kept us informed on a timely matter.
Jerry is an amazing person who you can tell really cares about you. I felt confident that I was working with the best. Definitely recommend Jerry 10 times out of 10.
Jerry Beurkens has provided personal legal advice for me and my family since 1993. He has been fair, practical and straightforward. We appreciate his integrity.
Jerry and his team treated me very well after a painful car accident that left me with permanent damage. Great lawyer.

Jerry has helped us on two occasions when we needed an attorney and we were very pleased with his knowledge and experience.  Kara also was part of us getting a favorable outcome to a tough legal situation. We highly recommend their services.

Please do not give this woman your money. She represented my ex-husband and helped him take complete advantage of me. I was a stay at home mom of ten years. Connie took complete advantage. While my ex paid her 60K to leave me without alimony and a pitiful child support agreement, I felt "wrongly" that I wasn't entitled to pay for defense myself. Don't make this mistake, for yourself or your spouse. An equitable divorce is key to happiness for the whole family. Working with Connie breeds resentment and feelings of hurt that will plague your relationship with you family for years. Money isn't everything, but this woman will leave people in despair when they are going through the worst time of their lives.

I highly recommend Attorney Connie Thacker and her office. She handled my case with confidence, skill and professionalism even against a tiger of a personality. She also showed genuine kindness to me when I felt overwhelmed. Her staff was professional, helpful and a pleasure to work with as well.I am grateful!

I would never recommend this attorney. In my experience, communication was inconsistent, and I was disappointed with how my concerns were addressed. During mediation, I experienced limited support and advocacy on my behalf. When I raised questions and concerns about aspects of my case, I did not feel they were acknowledged or clearly explained. This experience added significant stress during an already very difficult time in life.
Don't waste your money. He was worthless.

Allison's practice of insulting the physical appearance of other female attorneys instead of arguing her case demonstrates that not only is she actively contributing to the culture of sexism in the legal community, but that her skills in legal argument have not matured to a level appropriate for a legal professional. Do better.
Connie Thacker is the best around!!! I recommend her to everyone I know :)

I can’t say enough good things about my experience with Allison Sleight. From our very first conversation, it was clear she had an exceptional understanding of the legal system and was always one step ahead. Throughout the entire process, she was fully invested, making me feel seen and supported. She genuinely cared, listened attentively, and guided me every step of the way. Without a doubt, I would wholeheartedly recommend hiring her to guide you through the process.

Connie Thacker @ Thacker Sleight PC is the real deal. She is a strong advocate and excellent negotiator to help you get what you want. Her critical thinking and competency are unmatched. She helped me navigate a complicated divorce and I am very grateful.

I had a traumatizing experience with this firm. My experience included Connie almost immediately reassigning my case to Corey, a brand new associate with very little experience. Connie demonstrated verbally abusive tactics-- at one point, when I asked why I was experiencing extreme unresponsiveness, she stated, "There's only as much justice as you can afford," and subsequently accused me of having a balance. In fact, I was paid up at that time.

When I pointed that out, she gaslit me and tried to backtrack her comments, making up blatant falsehoods. Her associate, Corey misrepresented the facts of my case in court and failed to respond to any communications for over a month-- leading right up to a hearing date. Corey did not respond to multiple requests for a phonecall or preparation leading up to our divorce mediation. This neglect resulted in harmful outcomes to our mediated JOD agreement-- which I may never be able to undo.

After spending over 10k and receiving more harm than help, I had to retain another lawyer to finish the case. I am in the process of filing a complaint with the bar. I have since spoken with several other past clients with very similar experiences. Do not let their fancy offices or marketing fool you. They embody the worst of family lawyer cliches.

If you've had a similar experience, comment here. I am wondering if together we can legally organize to bring accountability and spare others from having to experience such harmful negligence.

UPDATE TO ADD: Since posting this a week ago, multiple people have contacted me with a similar experience. Sad but not surprised that this is a pattern.

Emily Rysberg was incredibly professional, prompt in her communication and compassionate throughout my lengthy, complex divorce proceeding. I especially appreciated how Emily made recommendations on difficult issues and walked me through each step, and I always felt well informed of my options. I would highly recommend Emily with any of your family law needs.

My experience with Ms. Thacker and Ms. Sierra were both less than satisfying. I did not get advice, help, support or even kindness during my very difficult journey. After paying them over $30k and almost a year I had to hire a new attorney just to finish my divorce process. The new attorney at a different firm was able to complete my divorce process in less than 2 weeks.

Emily provided incredible support and professional guidance throughout my entire case. She communicated well and educated me through every step. I am grateful for her guidance during such a difficult life change.

We couldn’t have asked for a better experience! They were professional, attentive, and truly made us feel at ease throughout the entire process. Their thoroughness and clear communication ensured that every detail was addressed, and their approachable demeanor made what could have been a stressful process feel smooth and straightforward

Emily Rysberg has been representing me for almost 10 years. With her knowledge I was able to navigate my divorce and felt very supported. Emily listened to my requests, researched and fought for myself and my children through many motions, hearings and mediations. No question was too small. She always took the time to understand and helped me understand my options and how to work through each situation no matter how difficult it was. Emily is a wonderful and supportive attorney. She makes connections with her clients and makes it her job to be your biggest advocate. I highly recommend Emily and continue to share her name to family and friends who are in need of her attorney services. I am forever grateful that she was recommended to me.

I had the pleasure of working with Emily Rysberg and the team at Thacker Sleight PC, and I couldn't be more satisfied with the experience. From the very beginning, they were professional, compassionate, and knowledgeable. They took the time to listen to my concerns, explain my options, and guide me through every step of the process.

The communication was excellent - I always knew where I stood, and they were quick to answer any questions I had. Emily and the staff were incredibly responsive and made me feel like a priority, not just another case.

Thanks to their hard work and expertise, the outcome was exactly what I was hoping for. If you're looking for a trusted and reliable law firm, I highly recommend Thacker Sleight PC. They truly go above and beyond for their clients.

Thank you again to everyone at Thacker Sleight PC for your dedication and support!
Emily is wonderful to work with. She is patient, empathetic, and professional. She responds in a timely manner and kept me updated on all aspects of my case.

I have been working with Emily Rysberg from Thacker Sleight for over 10 years on an exceptionally difficult and complex divorce case involving both custody and financial issues. Throughout this long and challenging journey, Ms. Rysberg’s professionalism, attention to detail, and responsiveness have been second to none. Her commitment to my case and dedication to achieving the best outcomes have been invaluable. My experience with Thacker Sleight has been outstanding, especially thanks to Ms. Rysberg’s exceptional support and expertise. I highly recommend Thacker Sleight and Emily Rysberg for anyone in need of skilled and compassionate legal representation.

Emily Rysberg served as my divorce lawyer several years ago. I am 42 years old and am disabled due to a severe form of multiple sclerosis. I was left without health Insurance and put in a very difficult situation, one where I did not see a very good ending. Emily advocated on my behalf and gave me an ending I did not think was possible. She went above and beyond her duties all the while making things look easy and making me feel like things would be alright. Without her help I do not know where I would be today. In a lot of ways she helped save my life, something I will be eternally grateful for and never forget. I was lucky to have an attorney like her.

Emily Rysberg is an outstanding attorney and I highly recommend her.  Her ability to cut through the static amidst a high-conflict divorce was noteworthy.  Emily is very professional, always prepared, and demonstrated the highest ethical standards in the face of opposing counsel who had consistently failed to deal in good faith.  Most importantly, she set realistic expectations.  Despite a difficult situation, I was never blindsided.
The whole team did an amazing job for me. Very easy to work with, great communication.
Ms. Thacker is a superlative lawyer, advocate, brilliant and will go above and beyond for her clients. Very fortunate to have had her representing me.

Connie helped my ex-wife and I navigate through a Collaborative Divorce process; which was amicable and left us both feeling whole after.  The support staff was continually helpful and patient throughout the process!

Connie showed a deep understanding of my personal situation and showed great empathy during the entire legal process.  This helped me through a very difficult time.  I am grateful to Connie and her team for showing me support and commitment to my case.  I could not have asked for a better result.
Friendly, detailed, always available for any question or concern large or small.  I highly recommend this office to anyone who is in needed of a family law attorney.

Benji Judd is a horrible lawyer. He was never prepared for mediation and late for court. He requested information just to pad his billing and waste time. Settled for much less than the original offer. A mess in every way.
reviews.ownerResponse: Our records indicate that you have not been a client. It seems there may have been a misunderstanding. If you’d like to discuss this further, our administrator is available at 616-888-3810.

reviews.text: I’ve never seen anyone more nervous in front of a judge for a simple opening remark. The last think Connie’s seems to be is a trial attorney. Connie did NOT listen to my directions and went rogue without my approval.  During my case she would not listen to the facts and would become aggressive and even more than rude when I would even attempt explain the situation. Connie would repeat "my job is easy, I just add everything up and divide by 2" This should not have been the case in a 8 year marriage - where the other party did not work, there were no children and all assets were supplied by me. She actually took the oppositions side. I also got a extremely strong feel that Connie dislikes men. As I was too far into the process to change attorneys, I did the best I could with my lackadaisical "representation" (and I use that term loosely) She was so ill prepared for my mediation that she could not speak to my assets and thus I got taken advantage of. Connie also seemed very shaky in front of the Judge (the one time we saw her) and insisted that we not go to trial. Connie has an ego a mile wide and little to back it up with.

Connie was recommended to me from a friend.  Best decision to choose her.  I highly recommend her to anyone looking for a family law attorney.  She is extremely knowledgeable and guided me every step of the way.  She was always there when I needed her and helped me get the best possible outcome.

My husband and I called to discuss a post-majority 13th year appeal.  We talked to Courtney, who was wonderful, she agreed to look at all of our information and said she looked forward to working with us.  That said, our last day to appeal was coming up and she said her office would reach out to get things rolling and pay the retainer fee, etc; that we wouldn't miss the appeal deadline.  The office personnel NEVER reached out to us and we left several messages and now we've missed our chance to appeal and it will cost us over $25k.  Extremely disappointed and angry.
Communication was not adequate. I felt they were too busy to work on my case for the amount of money they charged. I would never recommend.

Connie and her team were incredible, I was kept informed every step of the way on what was happining with my divorce. They promptly replied to my questions I had, and did a excellent job for me both leagally and personally helping me along through this tough time in my life, I would not have wanted anyone else in my corner and having my back through this process. If i could give more than 5 stars I absolutly would. I highly recommend Connie and her team!

Watched my uncle and his children go through the courts with Kourtney and this firm.  She was able to put everything into perspective’, and ease everyone’s mind at the home, and with situations. All while showing compassion and ready to fight for what was right. I would highly recommend!

They are great been with them quite a couple years they take care of all my problems Courtney did a great job on the last case I can't say enough they definitely look out for My best interest they treated me great they're very friendly and they are very easy to work with
Thank you Courtney
Corey Volmering has represented Thacker Sleight with dedicated professionalism and attuned legal vision. Very satisfied with conduct and results, highly recommend

I would highly recommend Connie and her team.  They are very knowledgeable and pro-actively work for the best interest of their clients.  If you are experiencing a high conflict situation don't even consider going anywhere else.  Every interaction with this team left me feeling protected and valued.

I would totally recommend Connie Thacker as a divorce attorney! She helped me navigate through my divorce. She was honest and upfront about everything. It was handled with ease. I knew she had my back and I have no regrets.
Working with the entire Thacker Sleight team made a very difficult process manageable.  They helped me through every aspect of my divorce, were extremely knowledgeable and always responsive.

I highly recommend Thacker Sleight PC, Connie Thacker and Allison Sleight.  They have a compassionate, thorough and innovative approach to the law.  With Thacker Sleight, I not only engaged a law firm for my divorce, but I also built a relationship for all my future family law matters and have an on-going sounding board for legal matters in general.

I highly recommend Thacker Sleight. The team worked together to get my divorce done as seamlessly as possible. They communicated updates through emails that were detailed yet clear to understand. Connie Thacker was extremely helpful in explaining every step. I trusted her expertise of the big things and the little things that can make a different in the outcome of a divorce. She calmed my nerves and made me feel confident during the process. I will forever be grateful to her and the staff.

I highly recommend them for all family and business matters.  They are very organized from the start with their written procedures and education. Their commitment to providing the best possible representation to their clients is unwavering.

Allison is the most competent, most astute, and most successful family law attorney in the State of Michigan. I would definitely recommend this law firm, 11 out of 10. Also, Allison is great to work with; easy going, and has an excellent bullpen of competent paralegals and assistants who are seemingly always available and respond to emails quickly. I have had many prior attorneys and none have yielded positive results and demonstrated competency in and out of the court room, except for Allison. The retainer price upfront is among the steepest in GR, but you most certainly get what you pay for. Additionally, I have briefly met Thacker Sleight's other primary attorney, Connie Thacker, and though I did not work directly with her, she seemed to be an experienced, strong and fantastic attorney as well. I would absolutely, wholeheartedly recommend Thacker Sleight PC. Six stars out of five; they saved my life!

My experience with Tiffany and the entire firm was ideal. From her professionalism to warm support  I felt protected through my entire divorce process. She was patient in explaining legal-ease and took the time and care to make me feel heard.

I knew when I needed legal representation that Thacker Sleight  were going to be my first choice. Courtney Sierra was amazing. She was knowledgeable, confident, and assertive when my mediation day came. So thankful for her help and empathy in a sensitive matter. 😌

I highly recommend Thacker Sleight PC.  Courtney has been so incredibly helpful from providing advice and suggestions, to knowing the various judges and their tendencies, and even being there for me in emergent situations. She has an incredible grasp on the law and has provided me with a lot of context for my legal situation and position. She is super down to earth and will be real with you about what’s in front of you and what options you have available. She’s never pushy about anything and always informs me well of my choices and answers all of my questions thoroughly. She shows a genuine interest in your situation. I cannot recommend Courtney enough, she will do whatever she can for you and your family. I wish I had found her sooner.
If your looking to be taken advantage of and throw money away then this is the place. They pick you apart with fees while doing next to nothing.

in 2021, I was in need of a lawyer who could walk me through a very hard divorce and split of our family business.  Connie Thacker was so very helpful with her expertise and experience in this area.  She was very easy to work with, as was all her Team at Thacker Sleight and thoroughly covered EVERY aspect of the intricacies of all the restructuring of our business entailed as well as the complicated divorce.  In all of the proceedings, which included many meetings by Zoom, she was very kind and compassionate as well as on point at all times.  I always knew she would handle every detail and would represent me exactly as we had planned/structured from the initial phase of Goals/Outcome.  Connie Thacker was exactly who I needed at the very hardest time in my life and I will always be grateful for her professional yet caring demeanor and for the wealth of knowledge of the law that allowed me to immerge on the other side of this life event whole; financially, emotionally, and in every other way.  I highly recommend Thanker Sleight PC and the entire Team of professionals at this firm.

I wasn't getting anywhere with the insurance companies after my car accident. I contacted Steinberg Law, and everything changed. I was able to get fair compensation for my accident, and I couldn't be happier with the outcome.
Eric and Lee are both incredible people and attorneys.
The attorney and her staff did an excellent job. I would highly recommend!
The Lee Steinberg Law Firm exceeded my expectations. They were professional and provided clear and honest guidance during the entire process. I highly recommend their services!
Anytime I had any questions or concerns regarding my case my attorney & staff always kept me updated in a timely manner and very professional. Would highly recommend them.
I had a great experience with this lawyer. They worked hard and efficiently on my case. You won't regret working with them. 10/10 recommend!
The Law Offices of Lee Steinberg are a professional and hard working team. It was my pleasure to work with them.

Two Words: He Wins
If you are looking for the Best Litigation Attorney your first call should be Howard Law Group.Thank you Bill and the entire team for the work you do.
Outstanding communication and attention to clients. Very thankful for their services! Jean and Rebecca are the best! Highly recommend!

When I called a guy named Sam answered the phone. He was extremely rude and hung up on me the first time then when I called back he told me that none of the attorneys would be in today and I couldn't speak to anyone about my claim and potential lawsuit. I have nothing bad to say about the attorneys but if Sam is this disrespectful with everyone that calls it's a wonder Howard has any clients.
Very Professional, and Quality Law Firm.

Jean and Bill Howard are very professional lawyers.  They handle our family business.  We have worked with them for many years.  I know that if I have a question and reach out to them, I will have a response the same day.  They take care of everything from HR issues to manufacturing issues.  I would highly recommend them.
A very wonder group. They were able to answer my questions and helped to ease my mind. Highly recommend.

I DIDNT FEEL LIKE I WAS TALKING TO A LAWYER WITH HOWARD. IT FELT LIKE FRIEND. HE WAS SO CARING AND CONCERNED WITH MY SITUATION. OTHER LAWYERS CARE.MORE ABOUT THE PAY THAN THE PEOPLE. HOWARD LOVES TO HELP PEOPLE. TRUE MEANING OF A GOOD LAWYER
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much Graci!

reviews.text: Howard Law Group is a firm that handles complex commercial litigation, real estate, easements, business formation and estate planning. Small enough to give great service, smart enough to achieve great results.
reviews.ownerResponse: Love this, especially since it's true!

reviews.text: Very pleased with this law firm. Michelle McLean truly knows her craft and has provided us with wise and reliable counsel whenever we’ve needed it. We appreciate her professionalism and guidance.

I cannot say enough good things about Bethany, who was my lawyer for my divorce. She was extremely responsive and got me a settlement as soon as possible. Definitely didn’t want to just take my money, and was very reasonable compared to other lawyers in the area. I was a victim of narcissistic abuse and she made sure I felt safe going to and from court!

Very disappointed, betrayal and loss of time, pure professionalism. Almost destroyed all the work in expenses of inosent people. Safer without attorney than with bad 👎 a sold one.even sexual overlooks.

I had a great experience with Bethany Spencer as my divorce attorney. She understood what was important to me and navigated challenging dynamics with the other party well. She was knowledgable, efficient, and kind.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words, Elizabeth.  I will pass them onto Bethany. It was a pleasure serving you.

reviews.text:
I have had the privilege to work with Victoria Baker during my divorce.
She was not only professional and amazing at guiding me through the whole process, explaining everything and advocating for us but, she is also so kind and patient and that made everything so much easier for me and my kids.
She always made sure that my kids best interests came first, she respected my opinions, listened to my concerns, communicated all issues and concerns she had with me in a timely manner and also was not afraid to remind me of the end goal and to keep the emotional aspects of it all in check. (Which is important)
I can’t express in words what having her in our corner meant to my family. 🖤
Victoria is not only going to get the “job done” but, you can tell she actually cares about the people she works with and we are forever grateful for her and her knowledge in Family Law.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the kind words, Kathleen. We were happy to assist you through a difficult time. We wish you well.

reviews.text: This location is unprofessional with communication as they don’t know how to respond or setup a meeting. They have been ignoring messages and emails. Would recommend somewhere else who can respond better and calculate their schedule. (Mark D. Hofstee)
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry that you feel that there was a communication breakdown. This is Michelle McLean, one of the partners. If there is any thing that I can do to help clear up any confusion, please do not hesitate to contact me directly.

reviews.text: Michelle is the attorney you want representing your case hands down.  If you're being taken advantage of she's going to fight for you.  I'm happy to provide a more in-depth reference to anyone with questions. I use her firm for my real estate dealings.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Tim. Michelle was happy to help you.  Yes, Michelle is an amazing attorney and will fight to the end for her clients. Glad we could be of assistance.

reviews.text: Bethany Spencer is top tier, I want her on my side always!
reviews.ownerResponse: She is!  Thank you for the kind words.  We were happy to help you and we wish you well.

reviews.text: Very professional, nice folks
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words. We strive to be professional and nice folks!  We wish you well.
Thank you for the 5 star review, Mike!

reviews.text: Michelle McLean is outstanding and provided invaluable guidance during a challenging legal matter. Her swift response and expertise were truly appreciated. Highly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words, Ashley. Outstanding, invaluable, swift and expert are all words to describe Michelle!  She was happy to help you!

reviews.text: If you're looking for a law firm that will fight for you and your family, this ain't it. I went in and talked to Michelle about some custody issues I was having with my daughter. She pawned me off on Matt. Matt is easily the laziest lawyer I've ever had the displeasure of being in contact with. He not only sympathized with the other attorney stating that he knew her and she was a good person, she isn't. Should've been my first red flag. Matt was weak and ignored many of my requests including a request to modify my parenting time. Matt tried to convince me that the other attorney was a good person and he knew her and worked with her more than once. The moment he's started defending the other attorney, I should've asked for my money back. I feel Michelle was being lazy and didn't want to take my case. Matt did a horrible job. One of my hearings got cancelled and Matt claimed it was the courts fault. I contacted the court and since then have found out otherwise. This group will take your money and do nothing. Stay away from them and go hire someone that will care about you and the mental health of your family. This firm is a joke.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mike- This is Michelle McLean responding. First, I am sorry you feel the way you do. I assure you that I wasn’t being “lazy” but instead was dealing with the terminal illness and death of my mother. We informed you that another attorney would need to take over my files, and that even my partner, Mark Hofstee, would be willing take over for me. At no point did you ever reach out to me with any concerns until this review—over four years after the conclusion of our representation of you. Also, Matt reached out to you several times via email and you never responded to him.

reviews.text: Victoria Drake was the second attorney I took on. She has since represented me for the last nearly 4yrs. The office is thorough and detailed at breaking down where retainer is going. Victoria is very knowledgeable. She helps you understand the process and what to expect. She is willing to listen and is quick about communication.

I am always satisfied with my results working with Victoria Drake! She is very knowledgeable, professional, and responds in a timely manner. She helps me feel at ease through the entire process and helped us save attorney fees by reserving our case for if the threshold of burden was met. She remembers our history with our case anytime I have needed her!

From my personal experience with them, it seems to me that they do not listen to their clients. They have their own agendas, and do not care what their clients Issues are. You can always count on them to do what is best for themselves in all situations, while utilizing their clients money of course.  After my experience, I left feeling like they come to conclusions before speaking to their clients. I Felt as though I constantly had to prove to them what I was saying was true before they would even listen to me. After a couple meetings, and looking around a little more thoroughly, I feel their actions and manipulations may have to do with gender issues and biases. They do not listen to their clients. They set their own agendas. They will gladly take your money though and tell you they have your back. I suggest to you, from personal experience and with best intentions, that you do not believe them.

Edit: They read this review quite quickly. Perhaps it Shouldn't have been, but their reaction still shocked me a little. I received an email from them shortly after posting this, ordering me to remove my post immediately and threatening me with legal action because they did not like what I thought of my experiences with them. I definitely have lost any remaining trust in them that I may have once had, and this solidified any and all suspicions I may have had concerning them and what their self-serving intentions are.

I never reviewed but feel compelled to. When I came to this “law” office, I was told at my initial meeting with Christine W (supposedly under Michelle’s guidance) that my case was an easy win. The girls were giggling because it was such a shoo-in since I had all the evidence I needed to win my case. THEY SUCKED. I lost my dog to my ex thanks to these attorneys. My lawyer kept going back and forth with my ex’s and her confidence quickly diminished when she realized how thorough he was. At one point she said my ex was willing to give me $2,000 to not go to court and I could use that money to buy another dog and she was like, “this is so great! No one ever makes an offer like this!” Lady, I could have saved the $2,000 in lawyer fees and bought another dog, BUT THAT WAS NOT THE POINT! I wanted MY dog. My ex hired the best attorney in the state. I hired the worst. She recommended I include my ex’s dad’s name (a veterinarian) in my paperwork to “scare them” so we knew we were serious. Do you know what happened? They wanted to sue me $250,000 for defamation! That’s right! I almost lifelong debt based on her advise!! Come court, and she showed up with hot pink acrylic nails, and was absolutely unprepared. I heard less “ums” in high school speeches. I lost my dog because of these people. They only care about money. Not representing you.
Why post when it was 2017? After all these years I still feel the loss and am still heartbroken. I saw a photo of him, and he’s greyed and has gotten so overweight. It broke my heart to see he isn’t cared for. I still remember the false hope I had that it was going to be easy and that I had everything I needed to win… I just don’t want someone to lose something that meant everything to them or be given a false hope.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Cailey-
From a quick review of our records, it appears that we represented you back in 2017. Again, that was over 6 years ago, so I do not understand why you decided to make this review now. I wish you would have reached out to me personally if you had reservations or concerns back in 2017. You lost your case, not for lack of effort on our part, but because the representations that you made to us when we agreed to undertake your case were proven untrue at trial. Again, I wish you would have reached out to me personally back in 2017.

Michelle McLean, Partner and Owner

reviews.text: Due to an unexpected family emergency I was in need of a lawyer quickly and one I could afford. So I put my plea on legal help and Mr. Danian answered my call. He was ready to help and gave me an affordable price. It was right during covid lockdown but he still got right on the case and done what needed to be done. Mr Danian is nice as a person, but I would not recommend him as an attorney.  While Mr. Danian offered a good price, he was difficult to get hold of because the only number given is a cell number. Many times I would leave a message and text and receive no answer. Most of the time I had no idea what was happening and communication was lacking so much, I would find out through other people, or later by him, that I had court dates or appointments. There was a point where I asked for him to refile for my divorce after I took a short time to make sure there was no way for reconciliation, and after over 2 months of waiting, my ex decided to file instead. I lost a LOT of money, yet was given assurances throughout the divorce that I would have a chance to get back money, yet I lost it all. I was the one with kids to support, that were from my late husband. The mediation was a disaster and he seemed to be on the Plantiff's side. To make matters worse, I found out in April that my divorce was final in February! I had NO idea! No papers were sent to me, I was not contacted at all, and after my ex dropped a hint by chance, that it was final in February, I had to call the courthouse myself to verify that he was telling me the truth! I needed an attorney who would represent me, his client. Perhaps he overbooks himself with cases. I don't know, but he mentioned twice something about a secretary, though I never met one. It says he has an office, but I have never been there because we would always meet at the courthouse even if there were no hearings. Please, if you decide to hire him, be aware of these things. I was extremely frustrated through the whole divorce proceedings! If I had more money, I would have hired a different attorney!
Do NOT waste your time.  He will do nothing to help your case and take everything he can.   He showed up late to court unprofessional and very unhygienic .

I retained Megan Bos to handle the removal of a PPO, and she assured me there would be no hearing. However, the situation escalated due to her actions. Megan failed to communicate with me properly, served the other party incorrectly, and mismanaged the case. I had to travel from out of state only to discover that the court hearing had been rescheduled. She blamed the court for the delay, but after speaking with the court, I confirmed that the error was entirely hers.

Additionally, she submitted false paperwork twice, and despite my explicit instructions not to proceed with service, she did so anyway. This caused further complications, including falsely marking the service as completed in the system, which I consider deceptive and unethical. Her handling of the case created more issues rather than resolving them.

She also misled me by stating that the case would be resolved in a single hearing. However, during my recent court appearance, the judge clarified that the matter would require multiple hearings over several months. This directly contradicted her assurances and demonstrated her lack of transparency and professionalism.

Due to her mishandling of the case, I terminated her services. Despite her repeated failures and false assurances, she refused to issue a refund, citing a no-refund policy, while disregarding the significant harm caused by her actions and misrepresentations.

I intend to file a formal complaint with the Michigan Bar Association to report her dishonest and unethical conduct, as well as her failure to act in the best interest of her client.

I am writing to formally document my experience with Megan Bos, an attorney at Gower law PLC. Unfortunately, my interactions with her and her handling of a legal matter have been deeply troubling.

This firm was hired by my partner to resolve a legal matter, but the situation has only deteriorated since Ms. Bos became involved. Below, I have outlined specific concerns regarding her conduct and professionalism:
1.	Inaccurate Legal Filings and Court Proceedings:
Ms. Bos initially filed documents with incorrect information, including the wrong county for jurisdiction. When I raised concerns based on my own research, she dismissed them, but my corrections were later proven accurate.
2.	Encouragement of Dishonesty and Manipulation:
Ms. Bos encouraged manipulative behavior and dishonesty, which involved multiple parties, including Child Protective Services. This jeopardized a child’s well-being by prioritizing her client’s misrepresentation over truthful and ethical conduct.
3.	False Claims of Service:
On two separate occasions, Ms. Bos falsely claimed to have served me with legal documents. When the court identified the falsified service, she shifted blame to the court for providing an incorrect date. This caused unnecessary travel and expenses for her client, who drove from Chicago, only for the court to adjourn the hearing due to improper service. According to Michigan Court Rule 2.105(K)(3), “An action shall not be dismissed for improper service of process unless the service failed to inform the defendant of the action within the time provided in these rules for service.” ￼
4.	Submission of Forged and Incorrect Information:
Ms. Bos submitted court filings with forged signatures and incorrect details, including inaccurate billing addresses and service records. Under Michigan Compiled Laws Section 750.248, falsifying public records or other documents with intent to defraud is a felony. Additionally, Michigan Rules of Professional Conduct 3.3(a)(1) prohibit lawyers from knowingly making false statements of material fact or law to a tribunal. All of these issues are documented through emails, text messages, and court records. The pattern of behavior displayed by Ms. Bos demonstrates negligence, unethical conduct, and a lack of professionalism.

I strongly recommend avoiding engagement with this firm or Ms. Bos, as her actions have caused significant harm and undermined trust in the legal process.

Tessa is an exceptional Title IX defense attorney, and our family is profoundly grateful for her representation. She successfully got our child’s Title IX case dropped with one of Kent County’s public schools, but her impact went far beyond the outcome. From the moment we contacted her, Tessa demonstrated compassion, remarkable expertise, and a level of skill that immediately put us at ease during an incredibly painful and chaotic time.

Her knowledge of Title IX processes is extensive, and her ability to communicate clearly, calmly, and effectively with the multiple parties involved was excellent. Throughout the process she presented things in a way that built trust and confidence. She was always responsive, thoughtful, and consistently one step ahead.

Hiring Tessa was unquestionably the right decision. She not only protected our child’s rights but also guided our family with empathy and unwavering professionalism. The staff at SBBL is also wonderful! Professional, compassionate, and highly responsive!

We cannot recommend Tessa highly enough. She is truly exceptional at what she does.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the very kind feedback! We are so happy to hear that Tessa and our Title IX team were able to guide you and your family through a difficult and stressful time with your child at their school. We know how overwhelming these matters can be, and we really appreciate hearing that you felt supported throughout the process. Wishing you and your family a wonderful holiday season ahead!

reviews.text:
I am beyond thankful that I found and worked with Stephanie of SBBL Law. I went through an incredibly difficult school situation involving a Title IX complaint against my son. From the very beginning, I felt scared, overwhelmed, and unsure of where to turn. I consulted with multiple attorneys and ultimately decided to work with Stephanie and SBBL Law. This was undoubtedly the right choice.

From our first conversation, Stephanie was kind, patient, and understanding. She explained every step of the process clearly, advocated fiercely for fairness and accountability, and ensured that my son’s rights were fully protected.

What meant the most to me was how much Stephanie cared — not just about the case, but about my son and his child’s well-being. My son struggles with mental illness, and Stephanie handled this perfectly. She was always available, always compassionate, and never made us feel like just another client. Because of Stephanie's hard work, expertise, and dedication, we finally found peace and closure after a very painful experience.

I truly will never forget the difference Stephanie made in our lives. If you are facing a difficult school or Title IX situation, I cannot recommend her enough. You will work with an impressive expert who will make you feel supported, protected, and truly cared for every step of the way.

What impressed me the most was how fiercely she fought for me. Her preparation, attention to detail, and command in the courtroom were nothing short of exceptional. I genuinely felt like she believed in me and had my back the entire way.

Thanks to her hard work and dedication, I received an outcome I never thought possible. I truly feel like I’ve been given a second chance, and I owe that to her.

reviews.text: A family member was facing serious CSC charges that came with a penalty of up to 45 years in prison after some false accusations were made.  The case lasted a little over three years, went to the Court of Appeals twice, and through 7 different attorneys before hiring Heath Lynch and his paralegal, Sarah Lynch.  From the first conversation with Heath, I knew he was the one I trusted to represent a loved one.  The details of this case were unique, and Heath and Sarah went above and beyond to familiarize themselves with all aspects of the case.  Once Heath was hired, forward progress was finally made, and the case was over after a couple of short months.  The matter went to a jury trial that lasted 3 longs days and resulted in an ACQUITTAL ON ALL CHARGES after a short jury deliberation.  Our family can never repay Heath and Sarah for what they were able to do for us.  Heath is an expert in his line of work, and from our experience, the best attorney you could possibly retain!  By the end of the case, Heath and Sarah felt like friends.  There are no words to express my gratitude to Heath, Sarah, and the entire team at SBBL Law.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are so thankful for your family placing your trust in us, and Heath and Sarah were thrilled with the outcome in the trial after the long-fought battle in this case. We are glad this is all behind your family now, and we wish you all the very best going forward. Thank you for the kind words about our team!

reviews.text: If you find yourself in the life changing situation of being accused of a Title IX violation, and are not sure who to call, where to to turn or most importantly HOW to defend against the allegations, I'd recommend Tessa Muir! Ms. Muir fights for justice. I was accused by a group of students of saying sexually in appropriate things to them. (All because I held them accountable for misbehaving, and because one didnt like how I physically looked, yep thats the reality we live in!) Ms. Muir seen through the dishonesty as soon as the Title IX investigation was completed. Ms. Muir and her team were nothing but professional and punctual, including responding to emails at 3 am! Yeah what attorney works at 3 am? Well Ms. Muir does! Ms. Muir isnt a 9 to 5 attorney, I got the sense that she was on the case 24/7. I felt she cared and was an advocate, that one would want in there corner. Ms. Muir presented the facts of the case ans highlighted the inconsistencies in the students stories quite well. Never once did she use legal mumbo jumbo that made me feel stupid or uneducated. When reading her replies often, I was reminded of the late Billy Mays (weird I know but read on!). I'd be reading her reply to the decision maker going wow, she summed it all quite well, what else is there to say? Then like the Late Billy Mays himself, Ms. Muir continued as if to say "wait there's more"! While a Title IX investigation due to its nature does ruin relationships, and reputations, Ms. Muir works to make sure at the end of the day justice is served.  I hope I never find myself in this situation again (as anyone can hurl allegations under Title IX), but if I did, Ms. Muir and her team would be my first call all over again! Thank you Tessa, for your work, dedication, and pursuit of the truth.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jesse, thank you for the very kind words! We are so happy that you can put this nightmare behind you now, and we are thrilled to hear you were so happy with Tessa and the SBBL Title IX team. It has been a pleasure working with you, and we wish you all the very best!

reviews.text:
I have consistently referred Heath Lynch to family and friends after witnessing firsthand the exceptional service he provided in securing a case dismissal for a family member. When I was falsely accused of a crime I didn’t commit and facing felony charges, I turned to Heath. From the moment I was arrested on a Sunday night, Heath and Sarah were on my case first thing Monday morning. They wasted no time and had me arraigned and bonded out by Monday morning, demonstrating their incredible dedication and efficiency.

Throughout the entire process, Heath and Sarah kept me fully informed, communicating with me every step of the way. They provided crucial information that I hadn’t been aware of and ensured I never felt in the dark. Their teamwork is truly something to behold—it's the kind of thing you only see on television. They made sure I was up to date on every development and took the initiative to call, text and email me regularly to prevent any delays in communication.

Heath and Sarah’s thoroughness was unparalleled. They gathered vital information from me that I hadn’t even considered, and their use of technology was far beyond what most attorneys employ, ensuring they were always ahead of the game. Thanks to their efforts, Heath was able to get my felony charges dismissed and gave me the peace of mind I had been desperately hoping for during such a stressful time. He ensured that critical information was presented to the prosecution, which ultimately led to the outright dismissal of my felony charges without any prejudice.

If you’re seeking peace of mind and the chance to walk away as a free individual, I can’t recommend Heath Lynch enough. He is one of the best attorneys I’ve ever had the honor of working with. Not only have I become a lifelong client, but I wholeheartedly advocate for anyone facing legal troubles to trust Heath with their case. From potentially facing 15 years in prison to having my felony charges dismissed without prejudice, the outcome he achieved was nothing short of miraculous. Heath turned a nightmare into a reality I could only dream of, and for that, I will be forever grateful to Heath and Sarah Lynch!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the glowing review! We are thrilled to know that you felt cared for and guided throughout a very stressful process, and that it ended in a dismissal so that you can put it all behind you. Thank you for taking the time to write such a kind review of Heath, Sarah, and our team! We wish you all the best going forward.

reviews.text:
We had a legal matter in Grand Rapids and not being from that area were unfamiliar with any attorneys. Heath was recommended from someone we knew in Kalamazoo. We met with Heath and he explained what he felt was both worst case and best case scenarios.Neither sounded very appealing as they would both result in a felony conviction. Heath explained that there was the possibility of HYTA which would result in the conviction being hidden from public view provided probation was completed without further incidents. Through the next three months, Heath and his team guided us as we provided information to the court. Heath and his legal team worked with the prosecutor and judge, looking at the circumstances and possibilities.
We were very pleased when the judge agreed to consider a HYTA Conviction. At sentencing the  judge agreed to the HYTA.We were completely surprised when the judge ordered no Probation and the case was essentially closed at that point. We could not be happier with the outcome and the representation Heath and his team provided.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Mike, for the very kind words. We are so glad that HYTA was an option in this case and that Heath was able to secure such a favorable outcome. Thank you for taking the time to let us know you were happy with the work our team did in your case!

reviews.text:
In June I found myself in a situation that required me to find legal counsel. My husband got physical with me following an argument.  I ran to our bedroom and called 911 as he put his hand through our door.  The Ottawa County Sheriff’s office showed up after what seemed like an eternity.  When they attired, my husband met them outside.  To date I cannot comprehend what the the deputies were thinking because I was arrested after calling for help. Apparently my husband’s lies convinced her that I assaulted him and my daughter. He even added that I racked a 9mm and “almost” pointed it at him…

I was arrested and in jail for the night. I started to panic and was terrified about potentially losing my job and/or licensing through the state in addition to losing my CPL & 2nd amendment rights.  I was initially charged with felony felonious assault and a few other things that I do not recall.

I started looking & researching who to hire to sort this mess out.

Attorneys need to be convincing. I had talked to a dozen of them & all I heard were the same lines- like a salesman working for commission. A few of them sat ok in my stomach. But that was the problem… they were ok. When there is so much on the line mediocre is not what I was willing to accept.

I reached out to a trusted attorney that I had worked with previously on a civil matter from Warner Norcross + Judd. He referred me to Michael Bartish. I began digging into reviews & searching for articles about him. I reached out to SBBL Law. It didn’t take long for Michael to return my call.

After speaking with Michael over the phone I knew he was the guy. He was direct yet empathetic. He listened to what was important to me and the fears I had. He was reassuring without over promising any sort of result. He never said any of the lines I’d heard from the previous attorneys who seemed to not be genuine.

Over the course of about 2 months Michael walked me through the process, explained everything so that I understood. I could feel he was vested in this fight with me from our first court appearance. His presence and confident demeanor brought me peace at some of the most emotional times I had faced in a long time. Michael included me in every aspect of the case and looked to me to make the decisions on plea deals that were offered. He supported my decision to go to trial. He still never promised a winning result but his confidence gave me the confidence to fight this.

I had never watched a jury selection. The jurors likely never were jurors before. Watching Michael educate the jurors while assessing their ability to be impartial for the anticipated trial was nothing short of impressive. He has power in his voice & not the sort that’s disrespectful or arrogant.

At hearings Michael made clear arguments backed by law. He crushed every move the prosecution attempted. He has passion and speaks with a dominance you only see with true experience.

The prosecution ended up dismissing the case because any headway they attempted was shattered by Michael. This was a huge win for us!!! Michael and I joked that it was a bit disappointing not going to trial. Watching him in the courtroom and knowing his abilities I felt it would be a sure win and that it would put the prosecutor in his place even more.

If I ever need a defense attorney he 100% will be my guy without hesitation! I would recommend him to anyone needing help with a case.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are thrilled for you and Mike that this was the result in your case. We are so glad that justice was ultimately done, even though it took the prosecution until very late in the game to come to their senses. We are glad to hear you had such a great experience working with Mike, and thank you for your kind words. Hoping you can put all this behind you now as you move forward. Let us know if you need anything!

reviews.text: As a Disabled Veteran who was medically separated from the US ARMY in 2010, I've spent over a decade struggling between getting my VA records, service records, physicians and psychological information and records to the Social Security Administration. I've had 2 Congressman attempt to help me and countless Veteran Service Officers, I needed an honest and understanding, serious attorney. Elizabeth was not only candid and honest, she understood my conditions and was understanding and empathetic. My disability is primarily from PTSD suffered from over 3 years of direct combat, as an Army Combat Infantry Platoon Sergeant, but my physical limitations were not explained well in the past claims that I presented to the SSA. Elizabeth was a consummate professional in her presentation of all of the evidence both physical and psychological to the deciding judge presiding over my hearing. I was not comfortable during this process, as the subject itself is extremely stressful for me, however Elizabeth is caring and understanding, most of all patient...and that helped me overcome my discomfort and anxiety going into my hearing. I would recommend Elizabeth Yard and the Tanis Schultz Law Firm to anyone looking for a professional attorney that cares about your case, and will present your evidence in the most professional way. It was my pleasure working with her. Thank you so much Elizabeth, getting that APPROVED decision, was the best thing that's happened to my family. I couldn't have done it without you.

Attorney Matthew Bailey adjourned a custody hearing without my consent and out of my presence.

Matthew wasted months of our time trying to get me to mediate and agree to the demands of my child's father in spite of my adamant rejection to the idea. Matthew was visibly flustered on the day of the hearing and did not prepare more than a few screenshots for "evidence".

Prior to the hearing, Matthew was unavailable for preparatory calls/conversations as soon as the clock hit 5pm every day. No witnesses interviewed, no evidence reviewed, etc.

I had personally prepared myself for these last months to have a productive conversation with the other side and with the FOC to make meaningful changes to a custody agreement but Matthew had other ideas -- minutes before the hearing was to begin, he became angry with me for still not wanting to mediate so, the second I went to go find my husband for support, Matthew started the hearing without notifying me and adjourned it without my consent, without my being present. Then when we caught Matthew outside the hearing room, he announced he was withdrawing from my case and refused to explain what happened during the hearing he had just adjourned, though he did cite his "partner" status with Varnum LLP as some sort of defense against our growing concern.

We had to hire a different, more competent lawyer right away to reschedule the same type of hearing for several weeks from now.

Ms. Digby,

I am sorry you are upset. According to our records, you contacted our office in 2016 regarding separate incidents of personal injury on private property and a motor vehicle accident. As part of the free consultation our office offers I reviewed the facts and applicable law of your claims. Based on our evaluation I declined to represent you in both cases. I informed you of this both over the phone and in a letter on May 23, 2016 that explained our reasoning for turning down your cases and I encouraged you to contact another attorney to evaluate your potential claims.

Again I am very sorry you are upset, as I remember you were a very nice person, but I never represented you as an attorney in any capacity.

Sincerely,
Bill Failey

Dave Christensen, our founder, has built this practice on the principle that people come first. His willingness to respond quickly, even on a Sunday, and to help guide you toward the right attorney when we couldn’t assist directly, reflects the integrity and care he instills in our entire team. By leading with honesty and compassion, Dave sets the tone for every client interaction, ensuring that our staff understands that success isn’t measured solely in verdicts or settlements, but in the trust, dignity, and support we provide along the way.

We are grateful for your recognition of Dave’s example and proud that his leadership continues to inspire our firm’s commitment to serving clients with excellence. We wish you all the best moving forward and remain here to support our community whenever help is needed. Please don't hesitate to contact us at any time - even on a Sunday!

reviews.ownerResponse: David Mumbower, first, we’re sorry your call was disconnected, you can always try calling back, and while you won’t receive legal advice without first signing the attorney-client relationship agreement, we can still narrow down whether or not your issue fits within our practice areas. It’s possible you may have just dialed a wrong number, the firm has been closed between Friday until this afternoon (your review was left at 11:12am), there aren’t any logs, in or out, or voicemails associated with your name. So, if your call was dropped mid-conversation, it would have happened several days ago or more. And in that case this dropped-call incident must have been significant and you must not have found another attorney to assist you, so you’re welcome to call us back, provide your name and number so if your call is dropped again someone can call you back.

reviews.text: I would reccommend Hoffer & Sheremet to anyone in need of a Medical Malpractice firm! Both Aubri and Stephanie are thorough listeners, dedicated to their work, and extremely caring for their clients. They make intake calls incredibly approachable and truly make that first step as comprehensive as possible!

My aunt died. They took my case, had me collect all the evidence for several months, had me sign the engagement letter, then sent me an email 4 months in stating that after reviewing their current volume they do not have the compacity to continue working on me case. Completely dropped me. Now I get to start over, making an already terrible experience even worse. The fact that they took on my case and then dropped me four months later due to their volume is completely unacceptable and unprofessional. You guys should be ashamed of yourself.

Update in response to your response: regardless of weather or not it was a malpractice case, YOU TOOK THE CASE.  As for the attorney you suggested, they said no. Im starting over because Hoffer and Shermet did me wrong. You also clearly stated in your email that it was due to your volume, so you dropped me. You also refused to tell me how to get ahold of that attorney. I asked many times.
reviews.ownerResponse: Cody, we are sorry that we are not able to assist you. However, your case was not a malpractice case. We are a malpractice firm. We advised you of that when you first called. We hired an attorney specifically to work on your case. That attorney turned out not to be the right fit for our firm. We suggest that you continue with that attorney so that you do not need to start over. We wish you and your family the best going forward.

Navigating a complex legal situation can be daunting, especially when it impacts your family and your livelihood. Scott Grabel helped my husband and me with an incident that happened over 20 years ago, which had long hindered my husband’s ability to secure employment. Despite completing all requirements under Michigan’s Holmes Youthful Trainee Act, a lapse left this case unresolved until Scott stepped in.

Our family needed a skilled, compassionate attorney who could support us from afar, as we were living out of state and relocating frequently due to work commitments. Scott’s professionalism shone through as he assisted us while we were based in both Arizona and North Carolina, handling every detail meticulously and following through at each step. He ensured we felt supported, informed, and valued as clients.

Even years after his initial assistance, when a separate issue surfaced, Scott immediately prioritized our case, dedicating his time and resources to help us resolve it quickly. His dedication to his clients goes beyond legal expertise; he truly cares about the people he represents and strives to ensure that justice prevails.

Working with Scott has been a privilege, and I wholeheartedly recommend him to anyone facing legal challenges and seeking a trustworthy advocate. He is not only an exceptional attorney but a genuinely compassionate person who is committed to his clients’ well-being.

reviews.text: In June 2025, my small dog and I were viciously attack by another dog while walking in our neighborhood. One recommended Sinas Dramis Personal Injury Law and the other specifically recommended Thomas Sinas at the Sinas Dramis Personal Injury Law Grand Rapids location.  I reached out to the Sinas Dramis main telephone number and my information was forwarded to Thomas.  Thomas contacted and met with me the same day, along with his team, Kayleigh and Amanda.  I am so glad I made the decision to choose Thomas as my personal injury lawyer.  He and his team were very professional, friendly and responded quickly when I reached out to them throughout the process.  I was very happy with the end result.  I would use the Sinas Dramis Law Firm again, if needed, and would recommend the Sinas Dramis Law Firm, specifically Thomas at the Grand Rapids location, for personal injury legal services.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience, Jeffrey. We’re grateful for your kind words and are glad Thomas, Kayleigh, and Amanda were able to support you with professionalism and care during such a difficult time. Your recommendation means a great deal to us, and we wish you all the best moving forward.

reviews.text: Tom Sinas represented me in a lawsuit against the insurance of the driver who carelessly caused an accident totaling my car and resulting and in broken arm and subsequent Carpel Tunnel Syndrome. He was able to get me a settlement of more than 10 times the amount of the original offer from the insurance company. If anyone suffers a personal injury accident, Tom is by far the best attorney to choose for representation!

reviews.text:
TLDR: These guys are legitimate and a pleasure to work with. If you're navigating a personal injury situation, a free consultation with them is helpful, informative, and well worth it, even if you're uncertain if you want to go the lawyer route. They treat their clients with care, respect, and candidness. They were able to give me an ideal outcome given my circumstances. Couldn't have asked for better lawyers.
~

I had absolutely no idea what the next course of action was after i got released from the hospital following an unexpected dog attack that necessitated emergency surgery this past spring. the reality of how deeply this event impacted me and could continue to hadn't set in. luckily i had a good friend encourage me to seek legal advice. and even though i was reluctant about the idea, i figured a free consultation couldn't hurt. I feel very fortunate that Sinas Dramis Law Firm was the first one to follow up and give me a call. They treated me with empathy, kindness, and respect and were extremely helpful and specific in their advice in what I could do at that time, and the information that I would need to find out in order to know the extent of my legal options. They weren't pushy whatsoever with trying to get to work with me and even gave me tips to avoid potential lawyer scams in the future, which was extremely comforting to me given my trepidation with seeking legal help at the time. The way they carefully listened and patiently and thoroughly gave me loads of helpful advice in just the free consultation alone helped me enormously.

i'd strongly recommend anyone that finds themselves in a personal injury situation to at the very least sign up for a free consultation with Sinas Dramis, because they will be as helpful as they can be and genuinely care, yet won't push you to work with them  or sign with them if you're feeling uncertain.

eventually i did work with them because navigating the waters of an insurance claim was proving to be a bit difficult to tackle on my own and i was really losing my steam and confidence.
When i chose to work with them, they took all the stress of dealing with insurance and medical debt collectors and the like completely off my plate, and they got me a settlement that exceeded my wildest expectations. Truly so lucky and grateful that i took 60 seconds to fill out that little free consultation request back in the spring.

The circumstances that brought me to the firm do truly suck, but working with Sinas Dramis made navigating the aftermath so much easier, and they took care to see that i could have the best possible financial outcome out of it.

I am very thankful to Kayleigh and Tom and the firm for being in my corner <3
reviews.ownerResponse: Jubilee, thank you so much for taking the time to write this thoughtful review of our law firm. We so appreciate it. It was a pleasure getting to know to know you despite the circumstances that brought us together. We wish you the best always. - Tom and Kayleigh.
