SEAN COX IS THE BEST DIVORCE ATTORNEY IN GRAND RAPIDS MI.

If you are looking for an attorney who is an expert in nursing home medicaid representation, then I would highly recommend the Law Offices of Sean Patrick Cox.  Sean was able to shelter our home and all of our financial assets, as well as most of our income, when my husband had to enter a nursing home.  It was a highly worrisome time in our life when we feared that we might lose our home and our retirement savings to the nursing home.  Sean put our minds at ease from our first consult with him.  The anxiety over my husband's health issues was almost too much to bear but Sean assured us that he would get the care he needed and he even went the extra mile to find a facility that he trusted and the staff there could not say enough good things about Sean and his kind and caring approach with all of his clients.  Sean designed an estate plan that helped us adjust to the reality of our need for long term care and he and his team drafted the trusts and the plan that got us to the place we needed to be.  We were glad that he took the time to explain the process to us and we very relieved that we found him.  He charged us a flat fee for everything and also had built into our fee agreement that any amendments he needed to do to the estate planning documents his office prepared for us would be completed at no additional charge.  We took advantage of this with two amendments that were completed for us for free.  I would highly recommend Sean Cox and his team.

Sean Cox went above and beyond for me and my family, and I cannot thank the entire firm enough for their help during an incredibly stressful time.  My 87-year-old mother was hospitalized, and I urgently needed a Power of Attorney and Health Care Power documents - especially because her insurance had been unexpectedly cancelled and I needed to get it reinstated quickly.  Time was truly of the essence.  Sean and his Team responded immediately, handled everything with professionalism and compassion, providing the documents faster than I ever expected.  Sean's support allowed me to focus on mom's care while knowing the legal side was handled effectively.  Sean's Team clearly explained each step and exhibited genuine care for their client throughout the process.  I highly recommend this firm!

I told Sean I was not looking for an aggressive attorney to stir the pot and that my divorce should be about a calm and collaborative approach. My priorities with respect to custody and parenting time were taken care of and we arrived at a property settlement that was fair to all.  If you are looking to hire a divorce attorney who actually listens to your objectives and is not looking to create needless attorney fees, please consider a consult with Sean Cox. Sean and his team have been here for me at every step and have made me feel so confident in my situation. His team, especially Yash. I do NOT recommend Sean or his firm based on the fact that his firm repeatedly missed deadlines with the court and when I requested a reduction in fees for this his response was to bully me into believing that he had done a good job. While my custody case was resolved to my satisfaction, the service I received from Sean and his office was, I believe, unacceptable. In my opinion, if you want an attorney that you will have to do most of the work for or one that you will continuously have to remind to do their job, then Sean is your man. If you want an attorney that will do their job timely without constant reminders, I strongly suggest you look elsewhere. Full details below. Good luck with your attorney search!

July 24, 2025 Hearing Paperwork: The judge directed that the post trial paperwork be filed with the court, and Sean stated in court he would draft and file. It wasn't until I reached out to Sean three months after the hearing that he acknowledged he had not filed the order. I finally received the executed order in the middle of October after having to remind him to file and write the order for his paralegal because they didn’t have the correct information in the initial draft. Meanwhile, the office had not problem sending invoices every 10 days requesting payment for work they had not yet completed.

July 2025 De Novo Pretrial Paperwork: Because the pretrial paperwork was not filed on time, the judge limited what we were able to present and discuss at trial. I spent a significant amount of time drafting and preparing the documentation to be submitted as evidence only to learn we were not able to present the evidence due to the missed filing deadline. Sean called me to explain that his colleague experienced a personal trauma with her own alcoholic abuser and missed the deadline, but there is a pattern of missed filings and therefore this was not a one-off situation that can be simply written off due to those circumstances. When I requested a reduction in fees for the missed filing, Sean turned it around on me saying I didn’t give them enough time to review the revisions and meet the filing deadline. However, there wouldn’t have been so many revisions to make if his team had done a proper job with the arguments in the first place.

April 2024 Hearing Paperwork:  The post-trial paperwork from the April 2024 hearing was not filed with the court until September 2024, only after I followed up regarding the six-month review hearing that should have been held in October 2024. Not only did this cost me additional fees because I was charged nearly $500 for the court transcripts since Sean and his team no longer remembered the details needed to file the order, it resulted in the 6 month review being pushed out to 10 months. That was four additional months the parenting time order I was fighting remained in place. Four additional months my children were subjected to unnecessary trauma because Sean and his team neglected to file the order timely.

In my opinion, for the reasons above and more, Sean Cox is not an attorney I would recommend. To anyone. Ever.

My case was very straightforward and simple, and I was so disappointed at how the paralegal handling my case dropped the ball. Felt as if once I paid them they totally forgot about me. I felt like I had to act as a project manager to keep things moving because filings were about to expire.

*Just got an invoice 1 year later for a small amount. Why was this not communicated to me a year ago when it happened? Seems to fit the pattern of forgetting about their clients.
Sean Accomplishes what he says he will! Straight forward and fights for you! His paralegal Shayne is wonderful also!

My wife and I had a custody case that lasted over a year. During that time Sean never truly even learned the names of the children involved in the case. Over 20k later and multiple court dates being delayed so he could go on vacations absolutely nothing has changed.

He does a great job of pretending outrage when you kids are being abused or mistreated. reviews.ownerResponse:
Jack, Social Security cut their staff in half when COVID started. So we unfortunately have had delays for many of our disability clients. And for most clients we have to appeal twice, until we reach the judge hearing level. So most disability clients have to apply first, and then they get an initial denial which we have to appeal to the reconsideration level, and then they usually get denied at that level so we have to file an appeal again to the judge level. So hang in there and we eventually will have a good chance of getting you the benefits you deserve.

“The pandemic, combined with high attrition, created backlogs. Initial disability claims pending have now reached over 1 million,” Kilolo Kijakazi, acting commissioner of the Social Security Administration (SSA), said at a forum hosted by the Urban Institute on April 11.

They Pitbull to accomplish winning goal Christian individuals who love the Lord who will fight for what is right they investigate every of what you deserve even to the point of assisting you with your paperwork they are the voice that should be heard in your defense
Best for the worker  and great people

Cory, we told you that we needed additional information about the property at issue, and the other party, before we could proceed. We have not replied to your latest message due to the language you used. I wish you well in finding other counsel.

reviews.text: Nice lawyer

Once you sign a contract with them to help with an appeal or applying for SSD,  You will never hear from them again. They don’t return calls or follow up with you ever!
I would of been better off doing everything myself.
Very disappointed with the communication and work ethic of this company.
No one is ever that busy not to return business calls!  They really don’t care.
reviews.ownerResponse: Janice, sorry for your experience so far. We will work hard to regain your trust.

reviews.text: Highly knowledgeable staff, and good legal team to handle your case!
Soloman law is helping with my disability case. I've been working with a paralegal to help with all the initial paperwork. He really cares and it shows. I would recommend Soloman Law to anyone.

Solomon law was the worst experience I've ever been through they could not keep employees the lawyer did not know what was going on half the time his staff was constantly changing every year Solomon law is out just to rip people off and make a dime they don't care about you or your injuries is all a lie
reviews.ownerResponse: Robert did not like his outcome but we kept trying long after any other firm would have given up. Not true what he says about our staff. Most have been with us a long time, although we do have some interns who rotate. We wish him well.

reviews.text: Very helpful and professional.  Highly recommend this law firm for your legal needs.
Highly recommend this firm. They are very responsive and helpful in the process of applying for SS Disability. So thankful.
They were very helpful and honest with me through the process and beyond.   I cannot thank them enough for everything.  I will recommend them anytime.🙂

My experience with McCroskey Law Firm was truly outstanding. I was under an incredible amount of stress, but Attorney Christopher Rabideau immediately lifted that burden by stepping in and allowing me to focus on my healing and recovery while he handled everything. He genuinely cares about his clients and made sure I received the fair outcome I deserved. I also want to recognize Lisa, who was an absolute pleasure to work with. Both Christopher and Lisa are professional, compassionate, and always prompt in their communication. I am deeply grateful for the opportunity to have worked with them.
Can't thank Chris  enough for his help.  Lisa is also amazing.  They answer emails right away.  Highly recommended

Attorney Rabideau and his paralegal,  Lusa, were great to work with. They were efficient, effective, and kept me abreast of all the updates regarding my case. Atty Rabideau's knowledge and expertise of all the different steps and process were exceptional. I felt confident in his representation and would highly recommend him and McCroskey Law for anyone looking for legal assistance.

We had an amazing and successful experience with Chris in two different cases. Lisa is very kind, an amazing listener, and does her job well. You can only expect the best from this law firm with genuine, experienced and successful professionals. I highly recommend Chris as an attorney.

I had a wonderful and successful experience with Attorney Chris Rabideau and his paralegal Lisa. Chris and Lisa were both very kind and helpful. Chris listened intently to all my issues and concerns and he was very thorough and informative. He explained the legal process and how it worked and it played out exactly as he told my husband and I. We can't express our gratitude for everything he did for us. I've already given his name to two others that are struggling with their own health issues and are in need of assistance. Thank you so very much Chris!!
Chris did a great job of helping me with both my SSDI and my workers comp settlement. Chris and Lisa were a pleasure to work with. Highly recommend!

I am so thankful I worked with this firm. Chris Rabideau was amazing to work with. He always returned my calls in a timely manner and was kind and clear with answers and support. Lisa is one of the best herself. She is an amazing office assistant. I highly recommend working with them for your disability.
Both Lisa and Chris helped me out so much through this stressful process. They both were kind and nonjudgmental. I truly felt like they really cared. I would highly recommend McCroskey law.
Chris did an amazing job helping me win my case!  He is very knowledgeable and cares about his clients!  Would recommend him to anyone!!  Thank you Chris!!

Just had my hearing today and Chirs represented me. I just have to say either way it goes or the outcome, he was very professional and caring. Very knowledgeable about my case and represented me well.  They are very hard workers paying great attention to detail. I was very pleased with how he handled my case and how I was treated. THANK YOU SO MUCH CHRIS AND LISA yall are amazing. I would recommend them to everyone!
The law firm did a excellent job representing me on my workers compensation claim. Extremely knowledgeable and responsive to telephone calls.

Chris and Lisa did an awesome job. They were always
very professional and always willing
to answer any of my questions. I would highly recommend Chris and his team. Thank you for all your help and hard work!
Called for information, Lisa was extremely helpful and kind. Also very honest and forthright. If I ever need help with a disability claim, I will definitely go to McCroskey Law.
Very helpful and easy to understand.
Chris Rabideau is a capable and companionate lawyer who gets the job done.

I had been dealing with a workers company injury for over a year before I decided I needed help. Within minutes at my first meeting with Christopher Rabideau from McCroskey Law I knew I was in good hands. There have been a lot of people I dealt with in regards to my injury that made me feel like I was wasting my time and that I didn’t have a case against my employer but Christopher really made me feel heard and took me seriously. It’s been a long time working with him on my case but he and his employees have really made it easy for me, kept me updated and have helped me so much! I 100% recommend this firm for any workers compensation related case they will listen to you and fight for what you deserve!

McCroskey Law gets it done!  I was overwhelmed, confused and feeling defeated until Chris Rabideau and his brilliant legal team came on board.   They stood in front, beside and behind  me.  McCroskey Laws unwavering support made the difference!
Chris and his assistant Lisa are working for you through the whole process. I would recommend them for anyone who has a disability and needs benefits. They will fight for you.
Worked great. They worked with me throughout the entire process. Couldn't have asked for it to go any better.

I was recommended to Christopher Rabideau at McCroskey law for representation in a workman's comp case and then social security disability. The staff at mccroskey law are always friendly, professional and I was always treated with respect and dignity.
Christopher is highly respected with his personal attention, professionalism and knowledgeable with the judicial system. I never worried about my outcome! I was in good hands.
Christopher Rabideau is a great lawyer that goes the extra step. Great personality and down to earth. For results see him

Chris is awesome. Very good at his job. He tells you how it is and is very trusting. He won me a very large sum of money which enabled me to move on with my life after being hurt at a large company that would not take care of me. I would recommed McCroskey Law...Chris Rabideau to anyone I know

Chris Rabideau, Attorney for McCrosky Law, truly cares about his clients. He is professional, detail-oriented, experienced, knowledgeable, responsive to phone messages, and is kind and understanding. He is right by your side at your court hearing.The staff is also professional, knowledgeable, kind, and responsive. If you are disabled, and unable to work due to your disability, call Chris Rabideau, Attorney, at Mccrosky Law.  Lisa P.
I’m very satisfied with the professionalism of this law firm.   Attorney Christopher Rabideau and Rose did a wonderful job on my behalf.
Attorney Steve Elkins prepared our Estate Plan and we are extremely satisfied.  He is very knowledgeable, professional and personable.  Highly recommended!
Peter Bosch is the man to call if you even need an attorney.

I interviewed Daisy when I was writing a book on leading attorneys in the United States. Based on the people that I have talked to, Daisy is the attorney you would want to handle your criminal defense if you got in trouble with the law.
